 And so, however I was, I must let go, or at least struggle in heeding ectasy. For I do not actually know the way, and in some sense feel both above the nature of things, but thereby weighed down. And thus, for those I care for, I feel no justification to struggle, to martyr myself and be knonw. As though there were this permanet condition, of which relief was all I sought. And joy, oh my, seems to bring me above, 'as though a gust of wind that carries me above the flame'. I don't know what is normal though, and what would be fine, worth adhering to, as though it were just something in the way. This is not some flip from one to another side, but rather a reflectio, as to how far back we can go, before we say, 'in liberty, peace and sustenance, we are continent and going, balancing out the propiety and limited experience'.
 In truth, we find means to ignore the weight of things, the impetus that makes you want to go. In being without, and not really bearing the load, we in fact lose liberty, for we are not in place, merely flourishing above. "As though stemmed." This makes things relatively flat, for we are in some sense looking down, but from on high.
<<<<<<< HEAD ======= >>>>>>> 2185b23f70b174f14fc813aede1613155bb7916b
What a day. I asked Bella out and she said no. A little dissapointing, somewhat surprising, but overall, I feel fine to breathe, sleep, eat and move in our liberal way.
 One major takeaway is the virtue of wisdom, and how she not only propells you away from wrong views, but also gives you some material to handle yourself. For you realize, from being wise, that people are not so special, and are living by their own way. Most people I know don't have exotic occasionos every day. Bella I heard, for valentines day, was going to go home and sleep. That's an ordinary person. I reckon that her excitment, or humour at least, as we talked about her class, was merely her being pleased with the conversation, and its funny element. This was for her though. We live on the edge, fortunate for liberty, poor for all things lower. For such things move slower, slower than you imagine. Those young merely do a lot in a quicker fashion, but still do a lot.
 In truth, if wisdom avails, then we can imagine that people are slow; and perhaps quicker if they have something in common. Me and sierra vs tristan are slow and fast respectively. As such, I think that we may live more slowly, and at least learn how to cooperate in that fashion; namely, how to make plans, learn about others and share yourself.
 I think its a falsity that fun and achievement even are held on high, with margiritas and the world watching. Those who do are merely sparkling. "There life is not some everlasting flow of ectasy." There is no liberty at least. As such, I feel pretty swell having brokem out of this, regreting as though we should slow down, be in her grace, then what, live slowly with her. My insight is that liberty requires acceptence and committment, to let time flow. But I find it hard to ground myself, orient myself, give perspective, of whichever degree foolish or not.
 I think the result thats occured is one where you were able to place youroself with someone, in that lower tier, 'common and ordianry, slow', and took your time being as a sign that things were working. But your from up high, settling, yet brimming. And your confidence comes up, you feel others to be pleased; almost as though you turned off the slow, and put up the speed, by our natural rythm. Yet they reamin. Perhaps people are naturally slow. This is ok, but something that relates to a general tenant within philosphy, or classical thinking, that to be as you are, requires some degree of seperation, or at least permission of scorn. And truly, we do both, but think ourself more affible.
 The warts in me of justin fucking Kaelen, or foster getting head from Lauren, or colin having sex with Nadia, and all of them more or less acting as though its easy, that you can just do it, burdens me with the anticaption and belief, born from a lower level. Which indeed, people may be permissable too, but per actions that bring such in such level. Indeed, you must stay there to do so, and feel confident in your place, as not to feel sulking from your higher abode. I live there though, as if above the clouds. And I've no real relation or commradery beneath. Yet, we exist there, in situation at least, and we be, as though in the furnaces that sit beneath the stage. We ought be there though, make no mistake of our efforts to acquire things there, less we remain. I believe Bella said no because you hadn't formed enough based on being down there. Maybe we were just being friends. Desire sulks in me though, and shame; as though the guys around me, who have such which they desire, do so with skill, while being of an equal line. I feel were doing something wrong. Indeed, liberty sparks high, and I think that whatever high there is from being ordinary, that it touches the surface of our beginning. It is of a different hue, as our own highs have differences from our base; but where there excitment ends, my peace begins. Our biggest fault is letting the light fall ontop of us, while we masquerade below. Were not there really. But I find this to be a vice in your path for victory; because how can you expect to remain.
I am heartstricken, but willing to accept this. That wisdom was right, and we were not so off to the side while everyone was together, relishing life in union; or even, if someone is freiends with another, or chatting to someone over there, or in a group even, that they are merely doing something they please, amidst the rest of the world going on. Work is most prevalent, as is our own time, hainvg showed up, needing to work, take breaks, speak with people we want to. There is an odd part of Bella's chattiness that grinds me, for I feel as though others are in cahoots with her. She goes up to them, they respond as their going about their day. She leaves, and they keep on. There is no center.
 This is all to say that wisdom gives reason as to what you may have and not, and how parts of people which you like are not indiciate of the whole. Nor something they espouse to be. And so we need to move on. Perhaps she or someone will come on high, or invite we down low, fine if I come back and forth. But to make something occur, with lasting need from below; which mind you becomes harder when the lows are of the virilant sort. That is in part our dissaray, as we may masturabte, eat chips or do this and that, but we do them relucantly, rather than with any oversight. I reckon when people go out partying, drinking the night before work, that there giving up their reservation, and order, and letting them selves go. I don't believe they think, 'well this is so poor but we'll be fine'. I don't think they give it the time of day.
 What we are to do I cannot entirely say. In part, life is a bind, waring us down, and inviting us to use wisdom to navigate this. For we may be ambitoous, overly disciplined, or smart in how we satiate ourselves around this condition. But the thing is that my experience is not so endetebd, if you can believe, to such line, whether its in the negative or possibility from it. I respect it, as though some managing affair, but I have my eyes set on the horizon, or the sky above rather.
 My experience is that consistency brings a lightness to work and also acquienscence; as though the wisdom of it, in its need and relatively low load, is incorporated by my. And by some natural rule and law, as we need to breathe but also eat, we feel endulably free as an animal. Consistency here, gives room for liberty to speak, and have your rihgt and grounded mind attach itself to things. This is the difference you. For I love Bella, truly, and want to more than anything else. But I don't like her, or feel endowed to her. We let Ashley like us, but we did not feel disposed to her, for her; compared to how we felt about Colin and Justin. For there is all manner of things in this world which are pleasing and nice, but most come from a state which is burdened, under duress, bound to tradition. I think were being to cynical to think that people flourish based on what their success of this brings. As though they were disposed to duty, but of the good they got, so they flourish there. It is a writers remark to say that the duty was never determined per real need, and thus what could be on offer. The want of drinks feels like a wish from an accepted standard; one of which will not please you when the end of that standard is met. For me, the standard is liberty.
 The hardest part of philosphy then is in being a man. I find it hard for wisdom not to abandon me as I let go of it, and find myself all humoured and cuddled by others, who are not so bold and noble, living their own ordiandry way --occasion or not. Normally, had all the words written bore me direction, then we would be ourself, but with others. As we all are, but natural bonds occur, and easily allowed. Amazingly though, people still go back to their work. Perhaps our unity, or general place amidst the cosmos, is not one where I find such bond. As people though we do, just perhaps not too much as partners, for which you ought share someting. We have friends though. Tristan, Tara, Carry, Andre. Even Bella is my friend. I just was abhored by the thought that we couldn't have more; but I also couldn't sit with the subtle possibility, for which a real relation could occur. Nothing in that I could embrace. Nor perhaps upon liberry would I want to. And don't give up. Bella struck you truly, but in all honesty I did not care for her much. It was the thought that she liked me which bound me most. I recall it being easy and nice 6 months ago when we let her go. We can still be.
Lets get straight to it, our life. We have not found a place. Oh my this is frustrating. There have been two apartments, but neither seemed to work. No one else has replied. There is one room, but its a 1000. Everyone else is silent. No worries though. We have room here, a great localle, and front porch. Work is fun and fine, easy in fact. Were running which is nice, the pillow has worked wonders, and general lunging and dogs are fine. We are not working out, but I don't think I mind. I'm not very hungry though, probally because were stressed. I was all worked up about Bella, told Tristan, then Tera. I felt pretty off these past 3 days, perhaps because I had not the steadyness to hold this want; as if to hold a dream. We just had such a nice conversation, and it kept going and going. She seemed so sprung when it was over. But approaching her, which began to dampen everything, she almsot looked at me as though I were out of my mind. I could tell, almost instantly, that she was nervous to see me, and not enthused. When I asked her, she said sorry, I almost oculdn't believe it. Strange to think. The relationship wasn't there. Not sure if or whenever I'd form that. But I took a chance. I hope this doesn't make things too awkward, with some of the girls. I wonder who knows. I think its bullshit that had I said something more delicate, not mentioning valentintes day that she'd say yes. She clearly wasn't enthused. A shame, because I feel like we had a friend, at least someone to go and talk to, similar to Andre. She spoke alot, which is almost too much. No matter. We are in fact all good friends, for work at least. And that is what its all about. Were in line for life and its living, but must go through the watering hole. I'd like to have bigger plans, but the thought is killing me. Lets be with our life right now. I am not eating, and this has me feeling weird. Nothing appeases to me. Its as if I need some morphine, to feel something. Its raining, so there's not much to do.
 Truth be told I have stopped material reading, sticking to journals instead; for closure. I am not gaming, and don't feel like it. I guess were sad. Star Trek is fine, as is youtbue, but things old make me feel depressed. This is wrong. I am just trying to figure this out. Not getting Hammond took the wind out of me, and I find it hard to care about what I once did. I did not feel like I could just approach Bella, and live so differently. But I was aghased at the thought of keeping her in my mind, or letting her be, while I tend to myself. Let things by. For this past week or so, its felt like things have been slow. I forget the things I like, care for and do. Like it wasn't there, and all there is is what I've missed.
The mistake is always the hard part. Had you been with bella, crazy for eacother, and she died, you been in no differenr of a scenario.
 Its the fact that your unsure, unclear, wishing you had done something better, like there was room to try something different.
 There may be truth to this. But perhaps there is more to lean on in terms of what you really seek, and how this whole mess was born from a throbbing of that, like we were bleeding a little, and acted rashly to address the bleeding.
 She seemed to show no interest, and never came up to me, never spoke to me outright. It was mere familiarity that had us saying anything to one anther. I did indeed speak to her, but I fetl off waiting to do this. Perhaps there was a gentler approach. But the point, is that if you were to actually like eachother, you wouldn't be so concerned or elated at the fact of her liking you, for you would like her also. I overreacted today to the impressions that she liked me, or thought I liked her. And before that, I was elated, or at least enthused when speaking to Tristan, for I felt like I go just go through: my excitement removed any sense of it going wrong. At least I wanted to believe.
 Now, we may just like ourself, find some pleasure, let other people do their own thing: while we do ours. I'm not sure what friends we were. It is one of those things that seems like it was I who was there. Not her. So maybe that is what we've messed up, to be more present, as I am with Tristan and Terra, and further so with most. Even Morgan today, I gave a slight nod to. No one has anything out for you. Were all just trying to live life. However any of us do it, we need not think or feel as would be unwise or fleeting. We just have to do whats right for more. And indeed, purity may bring with it weight and deed, which were not ready for. At least, it prompts you to let go, which I may not be ready to do. Don't feel harsh, nor beside yourself, or even doubt for time ahead, if you had said nothing. Hindsight is no measure of battering yourself, for I knew not that we would be better letting her go; which asking her questions is not an issue. Expecting a return though, that is where I now have no errors to the potential that it may grow. Such was my dread, as its been for all woman. That i'm not doing anything right. Indeed, we may rest on these learnings, and let a more natural course gudie our way. Asking her for a walk. But indeed, I think the trouble in making this happen, is that you want her heart, to love, our way. A walk is just a means to that. And perhaps we should want her for more.
I dont find the folk at work the people who are with me in the mean time, till work is over and we can go and live together. Even in school there were only a few like this. And perhaps that it reasonably so. Tristan right now is like that for me. Which is nice.
 Most people at work I describe in fellow terms, as though we are all there with eachother, have eachothers back; just a sense of coutresy and familiarity. I find myself saying hello to Sierra, Morgan, Jakob, Andre, Angel, Crisha, and perhaps Bella now too. Andy is a good friend, as is Tara; we just go up to eachother, at least we start talking relatively quickly.
 It pays to talk about the actual things in your life. Our scooter is quite fantastic, taking me all along the dikes, to MRSS, through Hammond and home. I worry about the rain; but so be it, we can return it and get another, perhaps the same. Our computer is great; I don't push it yet, but picking PC on the input removes all issues --and there was a distinction. It is quiet though and great. We have so many games, from Dragons Dogma, Baludrs Gate, Astro Bot, Battlefield, and we have Witcher, Resident Evil, Crimson Desert coming up, some civ ---new playtest, and large scale maps with high players (go settling!). Diablo is getting a huge expansion 2 months from now, and the next season looks fun to. All is great.
 I realized that if all is well, then some pleasure, as normal per food, and customary, such as masturbating, keep you going through the day. Acquiring pleasure is quite tough; from people namely, and money requires a life pursuit. But for the most part, outside this recent week of little eating, I've found much delight in smoothies, granola, tomato and seeds, oranges, potatoes, and corn+edamame+lentils. Having some sort of company with people is nice to; as were always coming to work, and indeed, my embrace, on the whole, but also in emphasis and smoething great, require according effort by me, and thus leaning into the flow of work. I'm never afraid to leave, because I am so in to the coming-going flow. See ya in a bit. And the more I do this, the easier that coming is. We have nearly no apprehension the night prior, nor the morning of. I need some follow through, for the going.
 Indeed, this thing with Bella speaks to this feeling as though we were drawing her, but only needed to address her, show her something, and she'd come right in. Skills, patience are needed to really create something between you; for you can't just draw her from your being elsewhere, nor be there for a moment, however shining. That light should create room for something. Truly, I'd have to test the waters to see if it's possible, and what could be reached. I did not wish to go there though. One part is emotional maturity, and that, perhaps in this grand abyss, where impulse and reason guide you, that as you age you may wish, as you would for anything, to be friends with someone, or something more, and that you could test such waters and see how to. Moreover, I think some development in skill could help, as you could learn what someone is about, and by that, trim off any flickerings of presumption, 'as our flames and affection sometimes bring'. You may also calm your passion and see relatable interest, and be drawn to only that. Forever it seems we've been drenched in this idea that were pulling people, and that they want us for some reason. The opposing reality of this creates a glimmering force, where we see there direction as for something esle; when in fact this is just how people are, going about there way, soft with most perhaps, as we all are, but bonded to few. It was our fault or naievity for thinking they were bonded to us, when it is true that they were not. And it is not for lack of a better word so
I did not realize how hard writing was, as it tends to move things along. Which can be touhg if your going through something; because it is nice to find some sense and live in there, even though another wave will come on. Writing just evens out those waves and leads to lasting footing.
 We cannot find a place. I've raised the price to a 1000, but very few are responding or available. My biggest qualm is being in a house that has the news on all the time; at least I find my long term interest lowered from this. And indeed, this part of me that feels something, be it of novel affection, friednly interest, or romantic want, so do we get pushed by this, and either respond in a avoident way, or we lean in, and become to responsive to anything positive. "It confirms what we were over thinking, or stating rather."
 So I expected things to be awkward today. But I was reminded by Tristan that this is between Bella and me, and I saw that. Everyone was the same, and I was reminded how nice everyone is, and how many people I like.
 I realized something, that Bella has always been an imposing force, as she's so chatty, but doesn't really chat with me. I felt beckoned to this, as if to overome. I had a hard time ignoring it; though I did do this some time last year. But still, I fetl like we were consumed by it; and indeed, this gleamed as something romantic, which made me feel poor for not going for it; and that she was so inclined to others.
 I am proud not to have been a martyr today. She did not look at me, nor address me. It is hard, because you must accept that she has no romantic feeling for you, nor were we that good of friends. I was trying to make it so; but truly, I was prompted by romantic want. And indeed, this sense of being overwhelmed is related to that, that indeed, it is such kind of want which makes me nervous around her. And I feel both hidden and afraid. I hope the next few shifts go by and we can address eachother. In all honesty, I don't mean to be friends with her. I think I could treat her like Max, or just say what I think. But we feel nervous about her; and indeed, this is because we cannot rest so easy, and for instance, treat her and or respond to her if she evokes something in you, as a friend does. I'm just too nervous, which is part of me and our foundation. In truth, familiarity and confidence have brought me near everybody, and able to be coridal and humurous. I have always found it hard for Bella not to be part of that, for she is so chatty, and I wanted her to be with me. I felt like I was avoiding her otherwise. I think that we can just be, and not be so distraught, as though were being overlooked. There is not really a group that I'm not part of. Let this go on though, find your course, settle in place, overcome this scenario, and find peace in the irreverence of someone who made you nerouvs; but we know now this is not for romantic right, and not truly important otherwise. Indeed, there's never been a problem, but our feeling, and time has made this nice and so.
I find myself, as I did for a moment yesterday, feeling somber over the fact that what I wanted wont be there.
 It was in part easy for me to believe in this happening because I wanted it. And indeed, a lack of fundemental principle, as born of knowledge or scenario, 'trust that is', makes me unerved and in some sense queezhy, 'as our indiscernity is known', to overlook such thing I want, or be wise even, in both our humouring of the feeling, and those which come up in following --be it envy, lust, worry and shame. We just felt unsure enough to be wise, for dissapointment and inferioriting emotions took sway.
 I did nothing wrong though, and all that has changed is that we have less license to speak with Bella. This does not bother me as much, for I never found myself easily talking with her. She was like Max to an extent. I tried to force this being more, but I digress.
 The lesson is one of romance, and by that, friendship. For people are not so casually interested in such affairs, but have some element of love. Indeed, friendship creates a place for this, but not neccessarily so. And indeed, friendship has to be subsantial rather than mere repor. My repor with Bella is absent now, but it was solid prior, recently at least. But it has to lead to something, whereupon further relation can ensue. I found this hard to do, which surely reflected her desire of me. But mostly it was our novel feelnig of her, no different than Amon or Mikaela. You find people beautiful someitmes, or funny, full of life in some way. It overwhelmed me, and had me pivoting myself, in some form of engagement or ignorance. Cirucmstance saw to our inability to lean into the latter. But that you were so overwhlemed, and unable to just sit and be, remarked your insolidity.
 That is, we were fine for a long time, but often dreams, comfort and expecation set in. Filling in the wholes as it were, but finely, as your circumstance is well. When they change however these vessicles pop, and intoxicate you on the way out. This created our motive for delusion. But it did remark that we had such things there, and lacked real substance in their respects.
 Indeed, I think of Tristan, and our time together. It is similar to Carli, Carry, Sonal and whoever else, but the best. But I don't really wish him to come over. I would die for Bella to be with me, but only so I could get closer to her. I did not actually wish to share with her that I love the clouds. And indeed, I feel closer with Tristan now as I feel like I have and can share such things. The point being that your friends are those you want to be with yourself. And indeed, some outer aspiration, or intent, be it affectionate or conninving, are remarks of you upholding a unerving or elicted view; for which youd normally move away from, nor not let develop --into a vessicle.
 In truth I found myself hardstrung to interject with Bella, and it was not too easy to ask her things, like baseball. I felt odd, as though as familiar as we were with everyone, that when she was there, we were not on the same page, and her outspoken nature made it so I could not be apart of it. I regret the simpler feeling we had until now; but indeed, loose footing lead me to honor our exagerated and longing view, for which association with her being easier turned into wanting, attraction, and hope for recepitivity. Talking with Tristan the other day gave me a feeling like we could have confidence in such, and we were overly excited by this, as it suggested the end was possible. I dreaded this the whole week, as I knew it wasn't, or that I was wrong. Boldness held me in. And as I saw her yesterday, I knew we were false, but were beckoned to the romantic hope, rather than ease by which we could associate. Life did not let me appreciate that; for peace was not what I sought, but action.
It may be this month or the next, or some time ahead, but I wish to settle into the path of reasno. One in which I get the pastures of peace and joy which I love to delve in, and be both commiserate to potential, be it in sights of creativity or prospect, and in the warmth, safety, feeling and fun of people. Indeed, some people live as though their not in a condition, and live for the sake of harmony with it. It is oh so hard to say, and see, or speak even, to whether they do so otherwise in any becoming way. It is hard. But wisdom for us is not about defining what others do, but what we do, and our view of others beocmes something were not crammnig for, for envy or hopeful sake. Were just in harmony. And indeed, it is one of those things that run along the lnies of, 'being right creates views which are not so determining, as such ways are not for you to see and haed to, but be in, via some innate and known satte'. It is for instance a clear and just truth that you need to be employed. This condition is everlasting, and comes with us through every single day, and as such, I wish to lean myself in, find ease in it, and enjoy my life when this basic condition is lade. For most things are either with hope to broaden the condition, which seems unneccessary if you mereyl taylor your actions as to be commiserate it in its basic form, and thereby earn a bounty of focus and time. That, or their temporary, and excite one, only to return.
 I think, in truth, its about learning, and being aware, for instance, whether someone really likes you. Indeed, it seems that you must bring something forth beyond repor, but something to share, relate to, something that you want to do together or talk about. It should be more or less easy. And I understand where your coming from, that you live differently, have less room or interest to try new things, or at least go out of bounds; and by that, share what you care for. But this is what making friends is for; and indeed, our free time is for me, and needs little but our time in it to feel fine and just. People exicte different aspects of me. Some woman often do this with love. Which is so hard to do, though perhaps still attainable; but in need of the deepest patience, as to be merely present over time. And my need for proper station is so, that for focus and control, but also mentality, in that we accept our conditioned flow, but in being with it flourish, that we do what allows this. In the process, I'd find, that where you transition to, and where your at, would afford an ease of conquest, in being simply present. Indeed, familiarity helps, and indeed our own special care is not something so easily shown. I'd note that people do talk about things, beyond them being mrerely familiar with one another. But it is not neccessarily about how they are, but just jibber jabber. At least, if they do say something, its about being tired. Seldom have I heard one speak about their philisophical quandries and doubt. These, to me, feel par for the course in a way of liberty, ie. flourishing amidst thee persistent condition. And I think that romance, friends, prospects and creation are possible here. But there not so easy in any case, nor do I wish to release my soul for them, but rather bind to them through our wonderful way.
Its so weird to think of people, as they draw this warm feeling and sense of affection.
 But two things are worth noting. One, is that these feelings are not bad, but should not weigh one down as though they should become realized, and soon. For the second point is that people are not merely these warm feelings, but those who you must practically and in similarity connect with. Indeed, as you get a sense of community, or the view even of someone's land, so can you hold an affection for someone; just don't let it get out of hand, nor feel despondance if time or compatibility bring it any further. Motion is what makes emotion durable and stable; otherwise, it burrows into you, yielding expectation and commission, and thus angst, as the required measures are not so legitmaite or real.
 As I've said, nothing has change. I hope Bella is fine, and I do feel somewhat 'gotcha, or hit and run', in that no one else is really aware, and I am not being judged in any seeming way. She just feels awkward. One part piece of perspective is that she never really made effort to speak to you, and we often only spoke in passing, or if I said something to her. Indeed, I noticed a little more interaction, but its not even close to Carli or Tristan. Nor was she as endearing as Mattin. She was kind of like Joey. And so nothing has changed. But worthwhile to note, is that your view ahead, is one that rests on your path within responsibility. I don't think we should go, as there's no determined reason. We may transfer, and if so, we'll be fine, as our state at least will continue, and we'll live where we go for the years ahead. I could stay here for some time thouhg; better put, I'm just not going to leave; some prompt may come when it will. I do think that we should fine our own place, and stay or transfer from there. But this is no rush. The polticis of the world no longer grieve me, as nothing said instills any regard for the compactedness of the world. I need not mention how vast and continous it is. Whereby motions of diplomacy exist.
 At any rate, I feel we are totally fine to like people, love them even. But we must dispose ourselves to the mentality and circumstance as allows us to be, as we feel and see plentifully, and merely bring ourselves as so wondered and impressed to normal positions, whereby we may just be and express. Love may be had, we just need to enliven our sense that someone is interested in you or not. I believe that our life has had no real consistency. And indeed, this error with Bella was just part of our process, and all things built up. But we've been, and in fact were doing well with her. I won't regret the removal of angst it caused me; similar to Amon, we were trying to get them to like me. But it just wasn't there. But that is just time mind you. And in fact, much of our instability came from being unable to rest and proceed indifferently. From which this becomes more liberal, may you attractively express. This possibility is there. And indeed, I make no consent to the fact that we live a certain way. As I put it, 'were working for a life which is smooth and easy, full of mind and glow'. This has to grow, unify itself, be consistent and common, for our depth to really glow. This may not happen, as such intricay may not have time. But we can hope for, or at least act upon such possibility, so long as we are unchained, and by that, elated by the future and change, nor despondent over being stuck.
 Truly, our interests feel of might and pure. Our girth of days bring the most welcomed and cheerful writing, and things only get better. Our recent mistake was from trauma, which was itself a small error, but one whose amneds we took for the sake of our broader life. Family came first over our novel want. And indeed, life could have gone on. But we know.
I feel unimportant, perhaps as I did prior to Bronte. Oddly though, I feel not that were on the outs of some large group. Rather, I see everyone off, doing their own things. And not neccessarily from our point of view, as though people I knew were characters and they were off in their own groups. I can feel the effect then of say Bella or whomeever, donig their own thing; which the more in-real-life it is, and something that is unsure, changing, adaptivt, and more or less humble in its goings, inclusive as it were, that so they feel apart from me. But I feel less vain, overdosed with crass thoughts, or doubts about reaching them, to which I can see our particular way as just being there, and fine for what it is. Jess for instance is going to some concert, and i see this as distant from the ever-going stream of life. She's going back in my view, but for interest that is hers to decide. I just stay with life, let it go by. And indeed, this life were living, which I'd say is great, but merely holds qualities that are no different than the high-manner of a monk, or even student of sorts --though for that profession is the aim.
 By all counts moving from Vancouver set me aside, to grow personally but in inwardly, which is to say, in the ground, of position, where we could treely blossom. We just got more matter, but nowhere to set it. And now, having come back to Pitt Meadows and been here for a year, I feel more known, seen, calm and stable then ever before. And indeed, the quandery if being present, mixed with the heat at home, makes for our intent to move an awry one. But we did it in January, accepted, then aligned. We will do that for whatever comes, and be fine. And we'll be so good, on our own. Our finances could not be stronger, with so much room to adjust and refine, all while keeping our fat deposit, and the effortless means to transfer. The spring is near, summer will come, and the roads and paths around will hold my gaze. I wish not to place any special mention here, as though there's something novel and unique about this, worthy of change; and by that, worth recognizing in others who may not be the same. Its just part of the flow, and per this part of the up, so our life is in; and per the down, so is that just what is present. Our life is not so guided by whether were in an up or down, only which one were in (having been that is).
So I've always felt odd, about Bella in particular, when say were in the back room, in front of the board, or by the desk at least, and there's a bunch of people, and she just starts talking to everybody. People are busy, and she is not the center of attention. At least, she doesn't hold some resepct. People respond, but its part of the chatter.
 In part I am not part of these conversations, nor will be moving forward. It almost drowns my ability to be, as most of the people she is outspoken to are not people I say much too.
 I could just write it seems for days, rather dry, but full of matter. My life is never a ceasing subject, and in some sense, brings me away from any real insight as to how things are. For in truth, people are better friends with one another than I. And we sometimes find ourself sitting in a similar spot, being outspoke, or at least firm. Its usually to Reza though. I don't tend to make it about me. At least I try to and talk to one person particularly. I never enter, or start a conversation, with several people. It is a good sign, of familiarity that is, to be part of this, and to make a remark, as though you naturally settle in. The boys as i call them, ie. Paul, Alonza, Mo, Kass, and Tristan to an extent, are not a group that I enter in. And Bella does. If me, CC and Carli were talking, Bella miht come in, but we'd remain fine, because were true to CC and Carli. If I were talking to Andy and Tristan, she is closer to them than I am, and so I'd be part of it, but almost on the out. If I'm talking with Terra and Kim though, or Chenoya, she pushes me right out. I've never disliked this fact about her, only that I feel like I have a harder time fitting in. It should not be vain. I was rather shocked to hear her considered chatty, which suggests something akin to Kass today, where she made comment of something funny Avi did, but remarked early, 'oh man, why does it had to be Avi,' showing that something said is part of the moment, and just what someone says. Indeed, these aren't meaningfull comments, but drawn out, but what someone else says, whats going on; people just want to talk. I reckon it helps them through the day. There isn't always something but work to talk about. But as I've said of late, familiairy at least allows you to be in other's prescence, which softens out the greater part of your day. I would take it more, at least there's room for this to be a factor, and a fairly weighted one, that her speaking to alot of people is more about her wanting to talk, than any esteemed receptiveness by other people. Tristan mentioning they are friends but he seems to know relatibely little considering, suggests they just speak together, but this matters not. Indeed, I often live my life in this way, in that I'm not so thrown or bestowed to those talking moents, but rather the matter of life. Indeed, I have false vision of what can become part of that. But struggle I do the most to have it be this way. For I feel worse, drawn out of my state, if I'm worried about others; for time wise, were not so familiar with them, and just have less means to have natural and easy discourse. That has changed, and I'm kind to this, but indeed, having more momentum, as not to be focused elsewhere, but more or less be ungrieved by any seeming 'missing out, or not fitting in', is useful.
A moment can be very telling, but not neccesarily of anything more than something indicative, as though there were some balance beem you were on, and you felt sore in your ankles; but this merely tells of your history, and your ankles strenght so far.
 I think that Vancouver is a good measure for how things should be, and to remark how we are thus far. For in that time, I felt good comnig, but then rather dowr in the summer. It is hard not to see the inevitablity that we faced in finding work, and how this made moments of lack hard to reconcile with. We were not ordained. But we did reach that flowing stability, and our emotion was in check.
 Now, we lived in Kamloops for 2 years, which brought us much sense, but no real position. Coming back to Pitt, we found such position, but found it hard, as we felt the need to always be on. I find that being at home makes it harder to rest; for there is so much to do; but for whatever reason, I can't sit for a moment, yet feel the time ahead is there. Were either going or not. One is idle feeling, the other waring and restless.
 Indeed, lack of familiarity, in having been where we are for only so long of time, and with nothing else mind you, makes it hard to work. For we are not at all endowed to be with everyone; as though we need to fit with them. But we feel outcast and weird if were not ourself, being either content or open. Some people don't fit this very well. And in particular, it's those people who I like that make me feel awry, as I feel like our state is sinking beneath them, and that there moving past me. There are people who I don't like, that I don't mind if there's no mesh; but having such feeling is not in itself good.
 I'd bring this back to our nature, and how it pertains to childhood. Quite hard to say. For I think of love and how it is consuming. This is a gross amount of somthing which otherwise makes us feel pleased and at ease. I feel there is more merrit and reason to be so welcomed and bright with all things, through the day, pitched up through the year, rather than in some consumated moment.
 We can just be ourselves in this respect. I find change however to through as about, and especially when were dissapointed, and have to sit on our heels. This contrasts with our want to move afar, someplace that feels different, to change our life. Indeed, I feel this in the slightest way; and indeed, we ought remark the fariness of our recent efforts, in so much as they were elected by me, rather than clawed after. Our place of good naturally moved forward, without making some choice that would see me subject to the folly of dreams.
 It is just hard to seperate how things are, considering how they've been, and how our overall state is but some moment in a function, whose form has changed over years, but held rather sulking parts; of which were feeling right now. Missing that place, feeling emboldneed to view Bella, her saying no, it feeling a bit awkward, it being a little obscure finding a place, the moment's been rough.
 But I can't sit here with any semblance of self and say things have gone poor. I think what often occurs is that in your stilted state you latch to things, be it ideas or people. And bringing ourselves back from this amounts to some matter of fortitude and formation, which we don't always have the energy to do. Our direction is just, but we find reason to go where we have more room and focus. A little patience goes a long way. And give yourself time to recover. I feel the whole of life, how its flowed and changed, and ultimately brought us back to a place where we can be who we are, 'with a life so to speak', is all hard to say. But were there, with a pulse who I'm happy with, a view of the mountains and stars that feels unfleeting, a relation with work that is neither forboding, lacking composure and ligthness, and friends, a care but also ease within our leisure and craft, as though it were just and plenty. All that remains is the parchedness of our soul; something which has come from us not being ourself, but running away. Where we wanted, though possible of that which would come upon change. A mistake was made, we asked Bella out. Perhaps to wholly. And she seems unpleased, nor wanting to talk to me. Mad sure, but a mouse indeed.
Work is tomorrow 630-1130, then same the next day. Were off, then work 5-10, meaning we'll go to bed at a similar time, but be done eating before 8. Then were off 3 days, which feels like a double edge sword, as I'm a little dry. No matter, we may run, think of food, and hopefully come back for our selves. Season 2 is tomorrow, and round 2 for test of time starts thursday. Scenes of Marriage is wrapping up, and Star Trek is near its end. Knight of Seven Kingdoms is pretty incredible, so can't wait for Sunday. Allies is reaching its peak, at PSX. I've gone a bit swiftly this past month or so, but were on track. Haven't really stopped for much, as were just going. ABC relativity is actually quite good and I'm learning alot; we also learned what intertial frame of reference is, meaning no acceleration --be it constant speed or still. Crimson Desert may be great, not sure yet. It looks wonderful, and the combat seems better than I once thought. Diablo is still fine; new season is still a few weeks away, but I'll get back then. Lord of Hatred looks wonderful, if only because of the new systems, namley in sets, gear, skill trees, and the war plans just modify the activites, but substantially. I still don't know what the state of the game will be; there seems to be torment 5, which is cool. But is it just a better form of the current game, in all the activities. I guess you could make nigthmare dungones or helltides way better. Not sure what else there is. I reckon this is good, as some new mode would seem new and novel, but remain relatively flat; whereas the depth here is going to be pretty insane. Just playing Druid, Sorc, Necro are going to be crazy with the new skill tree, and Paladin is probally my next.
 I'll mention my life. We found a great studio, but it was on 232nd, which seemed much to far. There was a 1000$ room, which did not seem appealling, in old haney (at the bottom of it). It just seemed off, and it was for a 3 month lease. I'm just holding out. One important thought is that were waiting to find a place, not to move. Knowing that were moving, 'barring any further smoke on the wall', is enough for me to count on, and accept things from there. We may move again, but from our own base. Work will be part of this wonderful flow, and all doubts of balance and focus will settle into our actual effort and views. All will be great. No limit is upon us now. Just writing like this brings everything up: I had just lost the motive. Without it, I could not shake the thought of not having Bella. We did not mess up per say; rather, we may have just left things as they were, and been cordial. This may return, in a feasible manner. So I'm quite calm. Tristan is great, and is nice to talk to. I almost feel fair in hearing him prioritize. Its not that he is neccessarily right, or anything special, but it speaks to everyone being rather distinct. Even if they did the same thing, it would be by their own distinction. Indeed, I look at Ian, who seems to want friends to hang out with, and this is just what he wants to be happy. Kyle on the other hand wants to spend time with himself, and enjoy games and what not. I appreciate this. I thinkk after 2016 we'll go back, watch Final Bosman, and the leadup to e3 2015, then finsih the year --bettnig throughout. I prefer the balance of being at work, making laughter with people, but not to some excess. Then I work, flow through this lever of justice, and spend our time at home, going about our day, up and down to return to work. Doing this leaves me with little scorn, envy nor care for being out with friends. Our abscence of things makes this seem special. I care not for prospects in that they are not on my mind, not that they are worth dismissing. And indeed, Bella is fine, and to dismiss what's happened is poor. But of what will happen it is not on my mind. Which is good.
I wont dwell, but I can't help but feel weird about Bella, and how tired we were and absent of self, as to want this to happen. We lost to ability to truly considere, or at least when we did, humour, and by that restrain upon something positive. What I see is that she does not want to talk with me, and that is a shame. But this is all. Your not exemplt from anybody else, nor is she privaleged to speak to others while you are not. I just realize how tired we were, and how it just felt implausible to go on as though we were alright. Were always on the edge it seems, and indeed, there is some reason to be. I find it to be a matter of what is truly right, and what allows you to be so bold and noble, but softly, and rightly on the ground. One remark today I liked was this notion of stepping into a high, or feeling others to do so; but that this just calms down, as can be seen in the back room when people were all chatty and pleased, to be back in the natural motion of work, being on clock, and perhaps the perpetuous nature of this --if nothing exciting was promising them somthing to end their day. That is all it is you see, and we are not different. I want to step above, feel enthused by someone, and ask them how they are. I did that with Brendan today, and I feel the wholer. But our less than stable state incorporates this sense of what your getting; as if such high is a lifting point for somewhere to go.
Work was good today. I could feel myself keeping up with our motion, and not letting any stiffness or doubt drag us down. I found in doing so that we were indifferent and affable to most people. Even Ankit --I believe that is his name-- I just asked him how he was, and that was nice. I don't wish to shed to much light on this, as were just defining as to reduce our emotion, but I can see that people being friends with one another is not some enditment on you, but rather something they do amidst their time at work. I would not care if work were fun and easy. I get slightly jealous, as were prodding along, and there talking with one another. It's like there disengaging from work. I like to keep engaged though.
 I think it bodes well for us to speak to our actual lives. For much of our trouble comes from being outside of this. For instance, when we come home, I'm comeplled to play Bf and watch that brutal fight on knight of Seven kingdoms; but I see were just doing as we indiscretionatly please. Some things pull at us from without; like why cant we do that. Yet, were just coming off work, and feel fully done as to do what we seek. Yet our live remains, and being part of that is best when simple, but present no less. Our mix of quinoa, lentils and rice are fine, and can likely be had twice. I would like some potatoes alos, and that nice blue bread. We've no berries, but plenty of oranges. And grain is good. We've work friday, saturady, sunday and now tuesday, so I'm feeling it. I will note how good I've felt from running, and not trying to workout. Yesterday we did some pushups, and the first set felt great, but the second was rather forced, and we were caving in our shoulders. Natural momentum creates means for a plank, but the plank is the primary factor. We may just do that, train it, and drop if we please. Overall, running is like rinsing in a way, as were just doing high knees, side runs, and maybe a few drops. But its all for motion, rather than intensity. As it were, I think that to run intensley is fine, but for a moment that needs it. And in general, intensity is about pushing. We've been running for a few weeks now and I simply feel great. We need not often push outside this bounbdry; the point being that its growing. Coming home today and doing warrior felt like its own kind of rinse, but as per our fatigue. It was real nice. And overall, our strenght to do chaturanga and lunges is fine. And this great adornment of a pillow for rest is fanatastic and gives me the deepest of sleeps. I feel pretty absent of unclarity when it comes to all of this. Though, I do feel like were shrinking; which is fine, but I just think that more stability in our shoulders for the sake of supple pushups would be great. There something I want to do, but you ought compare them to your rinsing motion of high knees, rather than a sprint. Even planking by itself can afford some benefit. The real issue is dropping with a curve in your back.
Is there something to be said, fundementally, about changing who you are for the sake of something other?
 In part, it has seemed noteworthy that such things are not in themselves wrong, nor is doing what is required to reach them a poor thing. It's just a matter of being able to do such things.
 I look at me and Bella, who is not the love of my life, nor ever was, but was merely someone I had some fondness for. I asked her about her day, some moments about school, and this was nice. But I wanted to see her more. This I found hard to do. And indeed, maybe we are just so off fundementally, that be it her or another, we have no genial or elaborate point of coherence. In a way, I see how we are able to be with everybody, unspecifically, in a novel way, yet in relation to us.
 This brings us back to fundementals. For I see that if we were open and fine with everyone, that not one would delight me, but all. And indeed, I have this general fineness with everyone; if all are the same as me thats great. But I do see that others have deeper moments with others; and I'm not different, comparing me and Tara, Tristan and Carry, with Mo, Alonza, Sierra even. Bella was very much in the middle. This is just ease though, and how well you see them and they you. I struggled to not evoke myself around Bella, but in that, invite little in; when she left I'd feel small. Her vocal nature had me feeling as though she shouldn't be missed.
 Indeed, as in all things, as they've come, nothing is wrong. We've merely leaned a bit too forward, or bent over here, and lost our footing. Were still on the horse, the same one mind you, and in great fashion. I see though that there are things I want, feelings I have, cohesiveness with people, that are not so clear or easy to obtain, and draw on me to either change, or reform ourselve as we are otherwise. It feels defeating to know that it is not from our other end that we make not for this, but in I, our weakness, our lack. And indeed, I realize that we are not so poor, nor is there too much to gain; but that of nicely fitting in, where we don't get distracted, hold our work, leisure and play within, and hold our emotions and excitment within a bound that respects the steady nature of things, that we are off, be it moreso in some moments, and less so but nevertheless in others. I feel my past weighing me down, both in my handling of want, our familiairty as to address this, and see what is possible, and otherwise worth no deference. And our harmony, oh how uncentered it is, for in the ways it's been not, either a lack of duty has accomodated me, or novelty, writing and or hope has brought me along. When hope is gone, novetly is lapsed, and our period of time is not overly sprouting, we feel the lack, the despair of the moment and bleakness ahead. For it is one thing to say that we'll never find no one, as were not out there in any general regard; and another to say we won't find so and so, for we are not ourselves now to reach it. And it was nice to believe.
Around me things are fine. It is just I who needs some sanctity. I feel lost, parched, seperate. Not my self as it were. And everyone around feels like there going in different directions; some away. And hearing the news, just exasterbates this, on such a large scale. Theres no sense of history, diplomacy, vast continuity, nor reason --as to compare the genlte view of war in real life compared to that in visceral fiction.
 Why are we feeling this way? It started when we passed on Hammond. We felt apart, stopped, unwanting to get going, 'to bring our feet into motion where we were at; we were near to going'. We spoke with Tristan, told him about Amon, who he said was married. I should mention that we spoke of ourself; and I went in thnking of what i wanted to say, but we just talked, without it needing to be anything, and our views and likes came up. I told him of the sky. Alas, I also told him about Bella; his advice seemed to be tailored towards me, rather than what I myself knew. We were so excited, as it made the idea possible. She seemed like an ordinary person. I saw Tera the next day, told her I had a secret and that i was going to ask Bella out --I have a crush on her. She made it seem like this was not a clear shot, and I agreed. The whole thing felt off. A real shot in the dark. I bellowed over this for the three days I was off, till I saw Bella on Friday. I came in, and felt myself somewhat intentfull, making the remark, 'I've always wanted to be better friends with you, but you make me nervous, and I never felt like we clicked; but as of late I feel were on par'. This I was going to say to her. I had no sure intent, but some reckoning. As I came in, things were fine, there was a group of us, and we went off. I felt as I was doing grocery how far we were. This is perhaps natural, as you consider your relationship with Tara, and Tristan even, and your a mile apart when say compared to your family, or how we were with Justin. And my thought was, 'she doesn't like you'. I wanted to ask about her school though; this was wrapped in some nitent to talk to her. I went through the day, didn't see her much, then near the end, I saw her staging in freezer, and I was nearby to talk to Tristan, and i just asked her about her test. We spoke for a moment, continued while walking to the board, spoke for several minutes, and made a joke as she left. She seemed so skippy and pleased. I read that at least, and from ear to ear I was smiling. I just inferred this chemistry, and was moved by it. I more or less spoke, 'I'm doing this'. I went thorugh health and beauty, thought of her coming by, then went to laundry, and was scoping out for her. Then I saw her, and i walked over through living, passed morgan who gave me a courtesy hello, and saw Bella where the filters are. As I walked up I saw a gleam from her eye, like 'what is he doing'. She couldn't even look at me. And as I said what I did, there was nothing, and I more or less knew. As I said, 'would you go out with me tomorrow for Valentines', she immediatley said 'I have plans'. I said more or less sorry, turned around and said 'enjoy your plans'. I did not see her for the hour that I was there. In fact, I went right over to Tera, told her, and was pissed. I then told Tristan, who seemed aloof, but was sorry for me. I felt going into Saturady, which we often work together, that she would say something, be mad, be snarky, or even if she was akward, that I could say something. I came in, say she had written 'Bella isn't doing clean, I'm not in the mood'; and as it were, my name was on clean. I don't know if she wrote that, but indeed, at that point, I was thinking this was rather playful. I saw her out picking, didn't mean to run into her. Then, half way through the shift, I'm walking by front desk, she's coming out of fridge, and she looks dead to me, no eye contact, almost like she were avoiuding me. The avoidance was palpable. This both surprised me and did not. This is how it were, as it is. I should say, the first moment I saw her i was passing her in fridge, and I made the generous effort to grab my milk and leave. I even brought my cart to get potatoes. I knew, and may have felt the same, that both being there was a problem. I cannot recall the exact position of this, but we passed her coming out of the department, and she, nervously I'd add, made no contact with me. After this I was like screw it, I'm ignoring you to; at least, I'm not going to hunker under this. I'll just keep going, and pretend you don't exist either. I was coming down the main isle, she was coming from produce, and i walked in front of her, kept going, great. As I was going home, she was coming out of the main staging isle, I said good bye to Reza, and kept on.
 The harsh take away is that she was nor is ever going to be part of your life. Nearly everyone is like that. People like talking to a whole manner of others, in different ways. But its just from being there. Bella is coincidentally not of this latter, now at least. But nothing else has changed. I wish this weren't so, but it is. Indeed, I merely feel the general weight of not having something which holds me, when we are not so up.
We work tomorrow 630. I may go for a run, but just a free one. I will, or submitt reason to, do planks, touch your shoulders; try and balance your left body, to bring your knee to chest. THis is actually a great core move; and this creates means for proper pushing. At any rate, it doesn't need much.
 I can tell that grains are filling, perhaps too filling. Indeed, calories seem a concern. Work days are always different mind you, and indeed, bread can't be overlooked as something to have.
 I guess I stand here, near the dawn of spring, having been at work for a year, able to be present with all, and many who are present with me. I have a good friend, have learned about love, and overall, see that life is fine.
 We are merely lacking that constancy which brings a flourishing. Indeed, running, knee to chest, warrior, pillow for for feet have made much ease in our day, and effectiveness. Work has not become so tough; though, worth no negligence. For the truth at hand is that work has never been hard, at least PCX. It is a life worth living, of all things dear activity. This cannot be overstated as something precious to me, and as some poultrice which is to form into things of an ideal or prospective sort. But drinking is all I need.
 We've learned what love is; and it is to let go, give, care not what you recieve. Let it speak to your ability to do so, and communicate, when someone cathces your eye; and your hadnle of the emtion is one where you feel lost. Vitality through life will bring your emtion in check, but there is still a mark of school. You did nothing wrong in how you spoke to Bella, and I was quite pleased to speak with Brandon today. Other people may not evoke that, and such is fine. We feel genial in our asking someone how there doing, how is the day, whether it's busy. This is me opening up. Fear not what you get. Nor believe that other's are recieving. People are just open in different ways.
Today was a solid day. I felt spry, on my toes, affable with everyone. There is part of me that is compeltely worn by the sentiment of other people, and how were just to undisposed to see ourselves as fundementally apart. Tis such a deep and large conversation, that I cannot make ends-means now.
 I think it comes down to knowing what you have to do. Part of the form which my doubt takes, is akin to children, who have little duty, or managble ones at that, go out and have fun when they can; and i feel we are not taking part in that. It feels immediately obvious that most people I work with are not so endowed, and that whatever they have which is good outside of work, or during even, is not something which avoids the connection to work; be it as a relief or what not. Everyone is working, plain and simple. People like different folk, as I don't see Matin talking with Andy very much, nor do I see Tristan talking with Teresa. We just like speaking to people. But it is hard not to state that our shift is what matters; and to me, our life as such, per the reoccurence of this. I simply don't wish to overlook the fact that of what may be good and pleasing, that it is not really so for the continuning nature of work. And indeed, that dear expeirence we speak of, comes from this sense. I feel there is this obvious pleasure we get in speaking with people, but it is merely so as time goes. And I look forward to this; at least, the ever-present nature of work leaves me seeing those present also as such. And indeed, I found, or find at least, if there is someone you want more from, than being bent to work does not fortell that similar sense of them. For we have not experienced them fully while were there. We just proceed normally, knowing we'll so who is there, for they are linnked to the given propensity for work. Time does allow for this though. There seems few people who I don't get along with, say hello at the very least, or speak more deliberately. Indeed, one insight I had was that your shift has to go one, and you have to put yourself with people based on how you are. Indeed, people remain, and there's no rush to go. This is our life though, and I feel somewhat lapsed in the reason for it, as to feel so driven, and by that, unfundemental to someone else. In truth, it seems that novel and or light company may occur, from time to time, from work at least. We are so ourselves, and coming and going, as though both calm yet swift. And this path feels mighty, worthy of continuous adherence. The dreams and imagery that say your missing out, 'well look how that turned out'. Nor does it seem that were you different, that something remarkable would occur. In fact, I think you are being yourself; and had you been less formative and more mingling, I don't think this would create some personal and soul connection, but rather a braod interwining. People have to respond to you, as funny and stout as you are. If they don't, it means this or that. But let there be provoking to see or believe that their view is so meagerly yet fully elsewhere. I had this weird suspcion of Angel, who in speaking with Tristan, seems relevant to Bella; and our view was that they were talking, and she was into him, but some sublt part of his; which had me thinking that for all our entirety, we drew nothing. You would not know the truth had this development occured. But indeed, the fear in it creates both the gorunds for and unease of such development. The parched side of reasoning has you defening your feelings against soemthing which you have no reason to beleive is there. Indeed, cirucmtsatnce may prop it up, but so is there some reason or feeling which is just comnig up as it were.
 I think there is truth in the nature of a life, and how being outside of requires deep inquiry, as not to be taken by the affects of being naturally seperate. We've moved so much, nor had much time to really envelop ourselves. And I can't say I know where to go. As we have no friends, merely people. This is fine, but seems but circumstance, for in being ourself, or at least being so taut and true, as to create such an experience I call dear, that we've garnered nothing else, worth loving at least. I appreciate Tristan, Amitt, Carli, Teresa, Kim even, Alex and Andy, Joey and Chanoya too. But there not Justin, nor do we have Ashely, or whatever it is I so feebly imagine. This may just be life and its odd part of living. For I do believe we are remarkable, and that were full of love and happening. It is only for me though, and not something anybody beckosn their life to. Their doing theirs. Alone without dreams it seems
We've got some deep emotions within us. Much to do with want, as though out of need, satiety, yearning, and to some extent justification, or ability, we look at women, people, careers. Indeed, I've never felt so fine constitutionally, in our views, sight, and feeling about work and profession, and that of the world. But my social view has been shook; and indeed, it is nice to see that our view prior was not off, but that it merely shifted into some mode I'd been in the past. I think there is something enlightneing, if only to speak to the ways in which people come together, where such people are, and how we may feel trepidatuous about this. At any rate, my thoughts and views are not so out of line, or unbecoming of somehting which is proper and stable. Its just, having made our mistake, or gone out of line, and been more or less swindled, I feel somewaht unsure about this edge case, where we sometimes fretter over our lack of ambition when it comes to girls. As though we just need to ligthen up a bit. I think, in part, it comes down to yourself; and indeed, let no one marshal your standing. If we feel lighter and full, worry not who may connect with you on this. For that is the point, you see, that we are naturally sprung by someone, in that we apprecaite some aprt of them, such as Matin, or we like the same thing, such as Alex and RE, or Andy. Tristan and health is a good view. And indeed, people bring different things forth; so that we don't just connect with Paul over his interest in food, for he may not evoke this when were present. Perhaps his enthusiasm and direction differs. Moreover, we may just not bring that out of him, which in its own right may reflect our sensibiliuty --as all things get hoisted by.
I hope we get this place. Communication has kind of stopped, but I believe all is good. There may be a change, and indeed, I'm not really feeling so thrilled. But take your time. Acting from here will be great, as I can see the friction which comes from drug feelings, old one's as it were, and this excessive style of thinking, whereby comparison gets exagerrated, and by that, our own imbalance of care and good, creates something akin to world meloncholy; whereby your own motion creates a stiffer and heavier view of those around; for which defintiion is prompted, yet you can never say enough. Rather than purely knowing. And indeed, such knowldge can come in common times, but is said and spelt calmy, in broader fashion, and with meaning, rather than to fortify
Truth be told, this thing with Bella has passed. I can't state everything so clearly, but the intrusive thoughts that were coming, of being left, missing out, being ignored or shafted by someone else, are faint at best. And oddly, as we beocme more secure, I feel that people's own expeirence becomes more local; and whether out of comparison, gladness or envy, we see other's doing such with respect to them, and that it is souly theirs. It is not so that their over-thereness is bundled with what other peoples over-thereness is doing. Indeed, everyone is quite distinct in that way. And per the general binding we all have, the time, community, ways, so are these more humble and in fact calming to seep in.
 I could say a lot or noting, but all is quite well. Having not pushed for training I feel better. We are thinning though, though, our mistakes here or over-doing there merely makes me soft, which in effect pronounces our thinng; as we otherwise feel not, or notice not. Moroever, we can do less if were soft. Indeed, planking seems the stronges exercise and creates our formidable foundation. Shoulder taps and knee to chest feel great, and fashion room and strenght for pushups. But it is all through planking. Running, as in high knees, and maridana, creates much room and being for our muscles and joints, and I generally feel great. The balance of this all is a little suspect, and indeed, one element is eating when you need to rest. Simple foods tend to bring us to softness, and rigidity at that. Eating more grains seems the trick; as you want to eat, but not starch. So eating several bowls of varied grain is the way to go, and happily I say this. Bread is a nice addition, but grain is just better. And indeed, tomato-sunflower, cucumber salad and oranges are great for the day, with smoothies and trail mix as energy toppers. I feel fine with this. But our yoga feels more absent; perhaps as were fatiguing ourselves more than contracting muscles. Recovery is marvelous now, using pillow for softened stretches. It's made our sleep a delight, and indeed, from these grounds or other, with little imperfections here, our work day and general day are more upright and solid.
 These cold days though, really bring you in. And I feel the uncertainty of our scenario, and how this makes it hard to lean into things. We can take a deep breathe, and rest on the fact that there is no sound reason for doubt, only a lack of reason to celebrate. These are different things. So remain ample and taught, and don't over-exhert yourself. You messaged her, things were fine through these days. Reach out to her on monday. This is more than reasonable, and not out of the blue. At any rate, two things you can do. Make sure your room is clean, as its hard to get rest and play with it not being so. Make sure your fridge is clean and your grains are made, as you need to be able to see food to eat, and rightfully, and thereby have proper lines to shop around. From there, consider what your already doing. Allies is reaching its final podcast and frametrap leading into psx. There is a final bit there. Then there is a the game of the year discussion. Not sure whether this should be part of this block. I will certaintly not hoist ourself into 2017. I believe I'm going back for a swift yet welcomed view of past gen through 2015. Then we'll do 2017. Were going to focus on Bossman. 32 thoughts has a new video, Civ has some timely vids about the new patch. Which, speaking of, is hard to get excited for, as the trial is so temporary, and the live game has no victory path, for me at least. We could try for military, but i'm just not into it. I think an archipelago would be fun there; setting up bases and means for conquest throguh exploration and modern. That I prefer. Maybe we can find a map mod that makes archi. better. Anyway, gold game is tomorrow and bar down has been fine. Diablo has not much, and indeed, I'm cnosidering just playing now, with Sorc, then maybe using Paladin for next season. Were not going to use him for Hatred; I'm proball doing druid, and everything will be knew, that the novelty of the Paladin doesn't need this. Reading wise I feel somewhat in but also out. I think some memoirs would be nice, from 18-19th century. Of people mind you, or at least those ni the world, rather than some specific profession. Some medieval stuff would be cool also. This whole Trial of 7, which mind you is tomorrow and looks nice, is bringing up these old feelings and views of violence and gutteral cries. It is not soft subject, but I feel readily able and supple in our treatment of it. So much that were overcoming it, but through some obsessed way. It's just so insane. But were not shying away, and indeed, have not let it beomce something we marty about. True Detective is really nice, and speaks to this fact, that the characters and show are whats greeat, and don't dwell on or be so existentially or viscerally be impacted by the themes or action.
I wish I had something more convincing to say, that we'd given the deposit and all were settled. I am still under the impression that we are moving on the 1st. We agreed when we saw Mandi, we told her of our financial situation, remarking the disparity of current and past paystubs; and she told me that was fine. I did not mention this to her, but our parents guarenteeing was a sore spot. And were still talking about the reference. The last time we spoke though was the day before yesterday, where she asked me why I was moving, and I mentioned our dads sickness, and that we were moving out now. She gave that message a thumbs up. But I have not heard from her. I messaged the afternoon of the days past, and yesterday evening, mentioning our wish to settle things. No reply. It was Friday though and today is Saturady; she is married, presumably with fmaily, has a young kid. I would not be surprised if she did not respond till next week. I believe it would be un-likely for the certain discreidt to me to be done, where she lets me know so that theyre passing, given the timely nature of things. I don't believe that is happening. I think that the deposit is something that we'll give when we move in. And indeed, it is a little note, but she could not meet me on the weekend prior to me showing, and so this lines up with whats happening now. It is not preferable, and indeed, I would like to speak of things as though thats what their going to be. I want to adapt and appreciate. Right now, we still have to proceed. Though it is good.
my sight of things is not so concrete that I can rest as though all thats happening is clear. But I am not so unsure as to feel brought out of what I feel likely. Moreover, I feel calm about the potential turn of events. The general path which we feel imbued to and on that count able, any more than we feel able and set for a game or show, is one that brings me to the esscence of whats good in this current scenario. So we'll make on. "And it feels oh so nice, with this coming, but the sense of it less circumstantail but rather nested deep within, to be back in our world, when both circumstance and depth were off."
 At any rate, I gvie allowance for ineffeciency in our way, for the sum is not really important; and it is a buisness after all, in our affording life, so I don't mind slicing off things we already have. It is a ticket after all, and using it is not damned by spending too much. Indeed, repitition highlights the centre of our way, and indeed, insight to that shows where we may settle long term. But in a transition, especially this one, if we end up spending 200$ extra, so be it. Were in such a state of excess, that the meaning of this merely says, 'whatever could be better and oppertune some time ahead, cannot be done so to the degree in which we leverage our ability now'.
So we have frozen corn, 1 edmamame. These are good for mid-day, early espeically, and for some protein. In a way, if we were training we'd like these; but the virtue now, given that were not, is that we still get much of the benefit from grain, but without the bulk. So consider that an option. We've got little Barley, and this can be a fine addition. Quinoa is plentiful, as are lentils, and rice is always nice. I don't think it a poor direction to have 1 bowl, then some bread, then another bowl.
 We have no kale, no oranges, mom needs Ham, and we probally need another tomato. Sunflower tomato is great, and the ample amount of trailmix is fair. I am considereing ourselves from a non training state; one in which we feel ourselves falling. By virtue of our inconsistencies and our need to rest. Cucumber salad works wonders here. And don't forget about cooked greens.
 I routinely find myself needing to train less and finding sufficient amounts with less. But, doing nothing has its effects, and it adds to our doubts. At any rate, the matter of running seems the fairest; while all isolated notions of training feel like compensation or icommiserate want. We have to move in harmony with work and leisure, and rest to. But, in that motion, we may throw in elemnts of core and training. I feel that training is like a rythm, a procession if you will, and sometimes its merely high knees, other times you run in spot, or you literally run, perhaps to the side. Drops are fine, but you ought not get carried away on the momentum of your lighter movements. Drop sure, but you need stability, the foundation of which is found frmo doing planks. And indeed, knee to chest and shoulder taps really helps enliven our core, and is in its own right part of the activitry; and in other words a warm up for actually drops. You can also just do some pushups from your plank. Little will do.
 Propensity is perhaps the hardest part. For you must address whether your current feeling is just part of the rythm, given that you've worked, or is it from past training leaving you fray, or by that count, training you've lacked. I trust the running we've done. I just see that we've lacked some rigor and pump from this, and am feeling the lack now. But we held on for a while, and indeed, have not much to return to. I just feel a little tight in my sides, and heavy footed. Some free range might have been nice, but I am trying to rest. We haven't felt this way for a while, and indeed, our energy is a ticket for activity, and truly, consistency of home and stead bring levelled food intake, as not to melt. But were fine, just growing. We've only been running for a month, and I feel great, and have had no neck pains. It ought not be forgoteen that we push alot, and that perhaps our lack of training meant that less couuld be done in recovery. Indeed, I feel the form of poses but not the shaping. Things will settle though, and
So, timeh as gone on, and I realize that in resting, or stopping, or having not much to do, be it from rain or indolence, that I see things below me, predications as it were, that if made or humoured, bring stress. Will Bella and me see I to I? Surely not, and that's alright; only our fantasy is tampered with. But can we be in her prescence, expecting to at least, and not have our feeling and place with others soured? Will Maninder contact me today? If not why so? She doesn't seem, in what she's alluded, or in her character, to be someone who would just ignore me, consider our converse so far.
