Indeed, if this is not there, then you may feel to precarious to do as you need, for waiting for the right moment leaves to little time to un-ideally recover.
 One simple rule remarks pitch, in that however you are in life, moving thither and fro, feeling this and that, that your belief and thus sight is rooted in the end you seek, and as such, your certaintly going to do the things needing to be done; and so you can do them when the time is right, but in waiting, do what is fittnig for the time till then. For instance, I feel less able to train now, but tomorrow I may do some free range. If this leaves me without the time to train, on the day leading into work, then so be it. The space we'll miss wont mean so much, as work will return, but we will have moved forward still with our free range: we just had less tme and room to progress from there.
 One ought rely on pea soup. Its more than feeling, tasty, but unbearing. It is also very cheap. It contrasts with quinoa in that it is a grain, and holds carbs and starch. Peas are a legume, and have less of a starchy effect.
Hey, I know you may not have any updates for me, but I've been given the chance to see another place. I'm meant to see it tomorrow. It is not somewhere I'd prefer, and if there is any likelihood of getting your place them I will pass on this new one. Just wondering if you can give me any sense of whats going on. You mentioned the tenant is leaving in 2 weeks. Is that officially happening? I know you probally can't tell me anything for sure, but is there any likelihood for me getting the place? If there is then I'll pass on this new one for sure, and I'll just have hope for how things turn out.
I don't want to presume anything, but my feeling is that you'd accept me as a tenant, if and when the current tenant left. I understand there's some issues happening there. I was wondering though if I could just give you the deposit now, so I could feel secure about the place. I'm in no rush to move, I would just like to feel clear about whats going on. And if its sooner or later it doesn't matter to me, I just want to know that the place is secure, for the future at some point. Is that doable? Could I just send you the deposit, and plan as though I'm going to move in when the tenant leaves? You could understand that if your place weren't viable, that I'd look elsewhere, but I can't exactly respond to them if I'm still committed to moving to yours.
Hey, is it possible for me to just give you the deposit now, and wait for the issue with the tenant to resolve itself? I'm not in a hurry to move, it would just give me much relief to know I have a place I'm eventually going to. I've got two other showings for today and tomorrow, and I'd rather just cancel them, give you the deposit, and if the tenant leaves 2 weeks from now, or month, or whenever, I can at least expect to move in then. Plus, I won't have to keep asking you what's going on. I'll just wait, and you can let me know when things are ready.
So I've done it. Got the place on Hammond. Its a real gem. Right down from the field, by thorn and riversie, on 117th, which is a nice grid, that runs far, and brings you to cross mid lougheed or up on laity. 203rd. Also. It will be nice to go into Pitt from here. No more overpass, the route here is great. We can go into ridge, go through old hammond, or take the industrial road. It will be nice to see mom.
 I have more to say, but I want to point out the fact that similar to getting a girlfirend, you tend to think of the highs and fun, but forget what is mostly there, and what is required. Our home can be the same, where we look at these novel goods, but realize it is just a place. And such place is what we need. Its just a matter if the details work; and indeed, from there, you can appreciate those finer elements, or fun ones to. One part that always roots you in, is the process of time, going to work and back, experiencing the kitchen, freedom, where abouts you'll walk, the times of day, the change in routes and view. All this gets moulded out. And i will say with a confidence warranted for most, that this differs, and is as such just, in that our motions are not towards something fair and proper, but rather a transition into a smoother lane: one which is already moving well, but with friction.
 Were moving in tuesday afternoon. We'll move the bed, and oh my, is it good to hear that room remains empty. We have the privacy from the bathroom, and thus seperation from the far two rooms. The room itself is big, plenty of storage; we'll figure out where to put our bed, tv and matt. The window is facing south, which is great. And its not too large, so in the summer it will be easier to cover. The stairs are straight also, easier to get up and go down. The downstairs holds our scooter. All is a treat.
 Were giving 2000 for april and may, then some 700 for march, plus the deposit --which we got from Justin. That's 3200. We have 5900$ cash, in our account, with more coming for march. We also have 4000, which is real savings. Were getting 1300 from tax return, april gives an extra payday plus a stat. Our finances are well. In a way, we have 3000$, and are making it back till June 1st. I mean to stay till September. The idea at least fits, that we may move for the fall. Alas, we are well kept, and set to loose very little. This tax return could literally be our food costs for 5 months.
I have to say that the most pernicous thing I've done in my life is watch porn. Its created this false and grueling view of sex and woman. Indeed, we've been reserved and afraid our adult life; mostly due to a stubborness to be ourself, and more or less ill-wise or inconstant attempt at being so. Our want of friends, or someone for instance, is never quite there, and gets exasterbated however much it is. But, porn has brought my carnal basis to a pointed degree, whereby that fondness or attraction gets blown out of proportion. As a result, our reserved, or otherwise original nature, has a hard time letting things be, breathing, liking someone as much as I genuinly do; it is hard, when our feelig gets more or less infllammed. Its as though were anchoring.
 I have found in the recent months, and generaly my whole life, that masturbatnig is not a problem. It doesn't make me nerouvs, it doesn't induce overhwhelming effects. I picture it like honeycomb, with some granlues being filled with nectar that creates desire, while the rest are less so. Thihs is more or less fine. It will be nice to jerk-off when I want; especially after work. And our toys are great, as they just add to the pleasure. The reason jerking off is better without porn, is that it doesn't actually create much want or grueling desire, or imagery. Your just imagining. Usually from someone we knonw, but only in part. Your the one there, doing it, and its quite obvious. And indeed, there may be smoething wrong here, and being chaste,or at least pure in your thought, may be ideal. I only say this for what we see in people may be determined by our view of them, beinng at least somewhat encased in sex. Outside of places directed towards that, or for children, as adults, such a feeling is not unwelcomed, but ought not guide you. Less you have nothing to bring, or expecation at that, than it is merely a part. I find masturbating, in the off and on way that we do, does not intrude upon this dynamic. Again, chastity may invoke a postion where only friends matter, and thus you see people less. This relates to our 'giving up' Bella some time ago. Though, in that case, despite feeling desires spurr when we felt detached, it really was just that, and our sense of awkwardness. Perhaps the porn, and masturbating, with one in mind at least, to a degree, brings with it a sort of stake. And the latter brings little.
So I have felt self-conscious about my weight, and thinness, for nearly all my adult life. Its just been that way. And indeed, many times we've trained and felt better; never enough it seems. And indeed, when we drop a grade, I fritter and frat, and now were about as thin as we've been in a decade. Yet, the insight that has been true remains so, and that is the fact that how you feel determines your confidence and peace. As such, soft arms and shoulders reflects small arms and shoulders. Were nervous though of the former because we feel the latter. And indeed, it has been so that at every grade of strenght and size, when we felt off, our appearence seemed to unnerve us.
 As such, we ought merely amend to do what is right. And indeed, I cannot recall a time, where our metabolism, work and seating felt full and true, when there wasn't exercise in our life. Pullups have added, but never been expected for these effects to occur. Squats have always felt fair and fine, and seemed to offer benefit to our legs. But indeed, for the bulk of our aim, pushups were all thats needed.
 I've found though, in the recent year or two, that doing these, and then going too long without doing them, or being too active following, or simply lacking any stretch, caused our neck to feel awful, and we'd get a bad haircut. Now, given our prioritiy of running, and merely doing pushups here and there, the pain is in my shoulder. I wonder if squats would offset this. I should note that the limberness of our movements creates a tendency towards these negative effects. "Their more quick to take such unfavorable form, if done grindingly." Indeed, there is much more to say, but what I've taken from my life, is that flow of time, reason and room to dedicate, and foremost, a similar place and pace for sufficient eating, warrants us to train, and earn it's benefit, and mentionable corralated appearence. Though the feeling is all I seek. "The care I have for something as brought by feeling bad is not so great a motivator. Nor do I care so much about the calm brought to such concern by a positively felt good. Worry not but for that."
So somehow it happened, ice broken. I offered to do clean, she responded rather gratefully. I didn't even try to talk to her, went straight to Tara. This felt like such a relief, for whatever reason. It felt as though I could be near her, say hello, and not feel as though I had to go away. There may be some of that lingering, but I care not. For she talked to me, about Reza being upset with her, that I choose to do clean. We spoke for like a minute. Then, as I came back from my break, I went up the main isle, saw my cart, and she was walking by and asked me if that was mine. Which is nice, courteous. As I was leaving the store, I thought a friendly good bye Bella would do. The meaning is not lost nor forgotten, but we are not at odd ends, and can just be. It feels like that. I recognize that she is not interested in dating me, and so be it. This is actually nice. And for one, we really know. Part of me gets carried away, thinking that were on the same level as we are with our other friends. I find the foundation of my life, as though workds, reason and resolve were lacking, to be somewhat ill-kept and stated as to just let us be friends. Or, better put, to actually be so, and not thwart away, out of deference or believing she doesn't like me, nor run head on in, be it with trepidation, calm anticiaption, or hasty proceed. I just find it hard to sit, and be ourselves. That is in part the problem. And indeed, this idea of there being a shoe, as to encase you efforts and ideas, feels the hardest thing, for you don't get to retreat nor languidly or hastily advance. You simply are, with the shoe, fitting it, appreciating whats along the way. To expect her not, or feel like were wanting but unable, is simply hard. But being as it is, lets us go the right way. For she knows we like her, or did at least. And that's ok. I can simply say as I like, as we did with Angel, or whomever, but make nothing of it. And equally, say not what I'd like, in passing, or hellos.
My mind is a bit flumped, I think from that sauce I had. I don't beleive it was the curry; it felt like a fish sauce, with cream.
 Anyway, I'm thinking of Bella, and how were just hard done to let her be. Not liking her feels off, as though I don't know what else to do.
 This moment is not a moving one mind you and so i've little to mould.
 I should say that my despondance is not from her not liking me, or not getting to fuck, but that these are not on my mind, or of interest: i merely like her. It was similar with Holly, in that I just wanted to see her. Yet I don't have some obvious means how. Perhaps we lack the familiairty and interest to do what would make this so. Indeed, there is an element of 'once were there, doing that, I no longer care'. I'm reminded of going to Roosters, and how felt going in, and why we went out.
 In a way, this is not enitrely about, 'if you just asked her to get a drink, or do this or that, she'd say yes, but were too nervous'. Were not really friends, and indeed, most things we'd say are like a date. Which I don't feel has this side which would work and another which would not. I think the date is off. And indeed, this may just be what time is like. And slower moments are hard see this. I reckon that moving out will not remove these moments, only make them less often, nor so lasting or burdening. Our highs seem to be higher, and conversely more often and lasting.
 The point is that in this state, where life is being lived, and your on pace with how other's are best presumed, that you see, can be, settle and sit with the way things are, that you don't love Bella, or want to do anything with her in particular, nor have a remosreful, nor gnawing want, to simply be with her. When I see her is good, such is enough, and there's no sense of concession. Time may procure, as will lessons teach you more. I have felt this before, and the remedy is in being part of a stride and state that beckons you not to see somewhat that much more. They come, they go, you expect not, nor ruin youroself over anticipation. The truth is that she is not interested in you, for dating. This is just how things are. You may say what you please, or forgo saying something, as you please. Because I do like her, but so its the same for Tristan and Andy, Sonal and Tara, and many others in their own nice way. Maybe the truth, is that the time we've had, where much has gone right admiteedly, and how we are, the place were in, how others are, that so may we just have to commission ourself to the un-reality, of her wanting you, seeking you, liking you more than you really do, as a work-friend. Its hard to be more than that. Perhaps we've only just now found confidence, and can start on these grounds, where we ask from indifference, and thereby know. It is like money, in that you don't really learn to find it, at least we haven't. And women are quite the same. But people are always growing, and these other facets are like our ability to masturabte, privately, but thus with our toy. It is some object. Maybe don't fretter, nor compare, nor envy, to imagine or pontificate, about how others are objectified, or how they make others objects. People are more important. For it comes to me.
So things are quite well. I wrestle with this thought of Bella; no different than anyone, where I think of liking her, looking forward to speaking her, as though there were some chance; yet this feels off, overshadowing of the cues were getting, and how, per what is normal and seen, how fine we are with that. We steer away though, and I just feel a little bit too invovled. Perhaps that's on me. We should, and more or less do, what we want. Yet, it's similar to seeing Lauri, or a landlord, where you can't just respond or react, but have to plan, as there's this stake. I think you can balance your view by seeing that she is not interested in that way, and this is fine. She would be more keen towards you, asking you questions. I really can't recall this ever happening. We are adults though, and there isn't always time. Indeed, there is part of me that just want's this feeling. Perhaps reason and grace have had too little room and continuity to settle, and bear themselves towards a future with real possibility.
 No matter, we are moving into our house, seeing it sunday afternoon --no rain reportedly. On Tuesday we work, then were off, maybe for 3 days.
 As it stands, we have 6000 or so dollars, and just over 4000 in locked savings. Were getting 1300 from our t4, and there is a stat plus extra pay in April. We are giving Mandi 3200$, for all of march, april and may. The deposit --which we got back from Justin-- was given back. A bit of equity. As I see it, if we saved 700 per these 3 months, then we'd have somewhere around 5000, and this does not include the t4. The reality is that were going to work 1000 a month, min. I wouldn't want to do any less. But an extra shift gets us an extra 350 per month, and thus handsomely covers our expenses. By all accounts we could easily suffice on 3 4 shift weeks. But this feels more than I'd like, admittedly. My aim, if I had one given the high expense, and paired with the novel and fluid ability to change position, is to stay through the summer. Were on course for that at least. As such, we've got 6 months of 1000 + food, call it 300. In a way, were running short on the food, which is near 2000. This does not take into account the stats of april and may, july through february --2 in sepetmeber and decemeber-- nor the extra pay day of april and october, nor our t4 (worth 1300). It is a strange thing, that having made 8000$, we made 1300. I reckon we'll make 50% more, maybe nearing 2000$. That is so much money, useful for scooters, upgrades, general spending ie. christmas, games and what not --to counteract saving usage. It also give some leaway to accumulated credit. For, over a year, if you had a 1000$ in credit, sure it cost 100 in interest, but time has gone by, and you get this huge sum. It is just a cozy scenario. Not one, mind you, that ought be over-leveraged, or counted on as though it were strictly part of income. But, I find it agreeable to consider it a balance to the imperfections of income. Truly, this place were in is more than perfect, but its 1000. We found a great room, with one roomate, similar to the one we just saw on Bonson, for 700. Vancouver always seems an option, but the readily avaialble 700 there is no different than 700 available in ridge-meadows; the stock is just less frequent. And then even, it is not to common to see 800 or 900. The point being, that I wish to and have all proper and transferable means to work 3 five hours. This gives us a flourishing degree at 700 in rent. And indeed, the extra 20 you actually get, the 30 per month from gst, the 2% wage increase this summer, the nearly every month stat, which is an extra 80 or so, increasing the flourishing standard to around 800 at a base. And indeed, the 500 in extra pay in the early and latter part of the year, and 1000 plus in spring, makes for any discrepancy to wash off relatively easy. Our current scenario is novel, a little exicting, riding off of a time which alights more of our leninant and conniving interest, 'though primarily fairly'. Our great sum of money, and current tax return, add a huge room for relevance to even be knicked.
 The point is that were giving away a chunk of our money, earning the majority of it back, likely overshooting due to our t4 and extra pay day. All is fine. May seem weird, as your losing 3000. But all the moeny you earn those 3 months wont be spent. We'll detail this later.
So a strange turn of events indeed. As though it never happened, me asking her out. But alot has come up, in my mind, which I'd like to talk about.
 For one, I feel somewhat worse, this having happened, as we are meant to properly, or dearly, accept the fact that she has no interest in me. And this is not because of how she personally feels, as though some other --which Angel for some reason strikes my mind-- may be one, but rather, it is that this is not the way things are. Were feeling outside other people's conversations, and feeling less of our own when we see someone talking to someone else. Indeed, the proper rythm and mind is one where your happy with all. At least, happy as you are, wherever that may be. Relationships are a common binding, in that trust and comparability bring some together. It is natural. And indeed, our talk with Matin today was great, and for some time I felt the same with Bella. Something changed though. We lost this sense of non-preperation or stake, doing as we wanted, overcoming the fear of doing so, to a driven state, where we feel lost, without priority, craving attention. Were exposed, or at least lacking this calm and innate umph; whereby we say not, see little, 'judgeing from our squinting'; and our glory becomes this thing which we realize is false, yet were nothing without. We cannot see what's there, for we are not.
I'm dwelling on the fact that had we not asked her out, and just took to the thought we had, that she did not like me, or we had gotten carried away, then we'd still be left with the ultimate question of what to do, what our priorities are. It is like jerking off. It is not good, but gets you going. And for many of your choices, they are already laid, and execution is all you need.
 It just becomes harsly real when I see that we truly never liked her. And the grueling feeling that for whatever reason, how we are in the commonality of things, that so perhaps are we off; and that somewhere else she may be casual. We thought her serious, as we did Holly. But she did not.
 There is a stem, no, a trunk of philsophy, that reflects the need to grow up, the inherent condition, the dismissal, or at least disregard, for ventures that reflect us 'merely movnig on'; but instead speaks to some kind of harmony and function within this unending stream. All great and good lie here. And indeed, who is so grown up and full of friends? Who has such time, such ease, simple interests enough to furnish such similarity, yet within the line and care of duty. There is perhaps a real adolescence, one which we lived in for an age, but partook in at as though we were free. That is so, for instance, that one only has duty to progress, or prepare rather, for when they are on their own. Let's see your life then. That is why I like ethnic people; or better put, people who, by their pilgirmage and perhaps natural place, value and need work. There life feels unenviable; not though because we have more, or that they have less, but that they are in a boat which is there for us all: self driven providing. Real value and friendship is there, for frivolity is either vainly sought, or achieved in a fashion not easily fitted, or found at least, amidst duty. Such is adolescence, that our job is to merely be employed, rather than satsify. The act of doing is enough, not what is given by it. One can just go along then.
 Being there, with Matin, saying hello to Angel, smoothly talking with Tristan, this is all nice. But its not what I have. Merely a mark, as by me being fine, or the relation I have, to simply be. Easy rather. I'm bothered a little by others having such ease with one another. It has that side of me which is meant to be ok, and in some sense overcome familiairty, in being so ok. Seeing others so familiar rubs against our ability. For we don't always have it. Indeed, it draws me to expect, given how we are. I find people don't really care, and that who they're familiar with is who they take to. But again, I feel it is them just going to a point of ease. Like me and Tristan. I just float there naturally. And indeed, be it with Matin, Sonal or Andre, I feel such ease. And truly, you can make this, asking people how they are, or about their week or day. Or asking what they do outside of work. It brings your relation to light. I don't always want to be close though. This fuzzes out our sense of want, for which others may excite.
 The truth, in short, is I don't know how people are, if their in cahoots, judgemental (though surely not). If they like eachother with ease, or some casually, of which we just lack drawing factors. Perhaps were just too much ok, and block others out. Bella for instance is a buttefly, flapping to where things are easy, where she knows. I am not an open cage for that. I'm too real. Part of me always expects, or anticiaptes at least, respect for this, admiration, rexognition and care. Over time this may happen. We were too soon on this one. It's nice that things have returned. But she is not there. You merely can be,
Is it me? Are we fundementally flawed, or unsure rather, of priority? Are we not doing something enough, as to feel fine and fair, and by that, open to more, and thus receptive to those who may click with me? Have we missed our chance?
 In part this is so, almost naturally, and perhaps with a momentary bend. But I think there's something to be said about what you want to say to someone, what your afraid to reply with. Bella has just wrapped my head. Indeed, these past months, I felt best because we had grown indifferent, letting her go, not living as though we were glorious; and our comparison to her, or nerve at what she said or did, held me not. And this was fine. I need to reflect, or look back, to see what triggered us talking to her more. For we spoke with her on several accounts, and this was nice. I think we just held this crush, this kind of want and feeling, perhaps satiated by our indifference; or at least letting her go in our mind, and we lived our life. But the crush that was there, indeed, sparkled with sex and shit. But not much more than affection. Perhaps were nervous around her, for we find ourself so confident, yet she does not respond to that. She is open as you can be. Yet, were letting our guard down in a sense. For someone like Ali, I speak not with her, and thus have to hold myself up, as not to ignore her, but merely say hello. The nerve though with Bella comes from the space to be open, yet we don't want to. I don't really wish to share with her this or that. Nor complain. Her enthusiasm is what strikes me, as did Holly's adultness, or Brontes beauty and strenght. Simron was humourous and hard working, Adara spoke back, tough as nails. Sinem was so good looking, and Nicole felt innocent, yet a little chippy. Brandi just struck my heart. It is me. And with time, persepctive will gather, as will your motion accrue, and you'll see that it is right for it to be you, but that the limit this places, is not something unique, nor restricting. It's just life. Love and wonder come easily to those alone, but not those you want to be with. Their on their own. They likely go where it is easy, for fun and gathering. We have that gratiotude for the ease of community.
I dont have anything parpticularly pleasing to say. The scenario in question pretty much is what it is, and its something you have to deal with.
 But, is that so bad? You loved, you lived, you messed up, and realized that someone is not interested. Maybe they could have been, maybe, and more likely, we just got carried away. I like the idea that when things are going well were fine to like. Jerking off works this way. But we don't get too invested, or develop expectations. Its worthwhile, given the events that followed, to see further into the ways things are. How to read someone, how to think, what things mean.
 The truth is that there is no one I see at the moment. Such is whats hard. I liked the idea of Bella, as I did with Holly. And in particular, this was aware to me, and our feelings got out of hand when we thought ourself less indifferent. Again, this idea that somoene just likes you for you, and is excited and taken, is overdrawn. I've understood this in principle since the time of Nicole, and put it into place with Simron. But this past month I've really felt the emotional insight to this. Which, ultmatley is fine, and in a way, releives the expectation upon you. If it turns out that it was just you, then so be it: I'll take the insight that we were not open or satsified, and felt this lingering in-simplicity. We can remain positive, flirt even. And the point is not to expect, but to be yourself, and not have expectations swarming around, nor avoiding people, or being so self-drawn, via indifference. \
 Maybe the idea of romance is most off in me. I fear the manner in which I'd as such connect, and that others, who in knowing themselves perhaps, or even just having some quality I don't, would attract the simple and or casual interest from another.
 I had such a nice time talking with Matin today. Really personal. She treats me so well. Nothing urks me though, and makes me stirred, than this feelnig like were missing something; like someone is there, waiting for me, or oppertune for me. A layer of confidence creates this, 'as though anyone is oppertune for me'. I don't think it a fair state of ours to need to reconcile or admitt the difference/other experience of others, for which we are not so clearly in mind. This idea gets warped a bit, and feels odd to address, especially in those things which we fear happening, and wish to confirm as unlaudible. It must be his time with Tristan, and her association with that, but I fear greatly this kind of connection I seek, but between Angel and Bella. I just feel as though there is some neweness to him, part of him she may see, 'like he has a mustache'. I'm insecure of myself, that she would say no to me for nothing other than what I lack, rather than the distance between us. To imagine him overcoming that, perhaps speaks to our insolidity, in regards to appearence, comfort in who we are, place in life, as to not be thrown emotionally, and thus pivot around or idealize someone. I feel important to note that this whole thing with Bella had more or less been avoided, in that we were satisfied, but perhaps just untrustworthy of that fact, given that there was inerest, too little understanding, and a moment where we had 'lost our pace', and so that higher than steady interest in her felt pulled against, which I counter-acted by embracing it, rather than removing myself, 'as our pace at the time had me doing'.
 It should not matter. We really don't like her. She's great, but I'm not looking to do anything with her. We just have some insecurity, going into our time in the recent months. We felt the need to deliberatley overlook her. We brought that with us. It is a fairer truth, that if she and Angel, or whomever, got together out of a whim which carried her not to you, or something similar or more serious with someone in her life, that we are still me. The weight comes from this insatiety, of being more secure with her, but not entirely, given where we'd come. Now, and had it been more truly, peace could be. But I see that we have no one. There is none to really like. Dating online is quite poor, though we may just need a better platform. Pitt Meadows is also not the surefire way to do so. If life were enough, I'd feel great, bow to the still-present nature of work and body, our responde and deed. The joy around, at home or on the field. All is good, and prominent. This is the last knot though, and its been hard to go thrugh these recent weeks. And finally, as if on a dime, we switched, and are no longer awkward with eachother. But our want is stupid, ill-stated, but we know not where else to lie. "And she, and whoever else, feels like there going on, to greener pastures, past us." Quite hard is it to be. Indeed, moving on from our wanting expectation and lust, we simply were, and she was the last straw, of someone who I was insecure about, which melted over the recent months, and became more substantive, like matin, over the month prior. We just hit a bump in the road, and let our normal embrace get overdone into something wanting and pure-personal.
I look at our time in recent months, and indeed, the possibility, or at least knowledge that things werent as I thought, made it easier to sit with, but, in such a time, we weren't wanting, but merely letting things be. We've been open, ask people things, say hello. There's almost no one I really care not for, or about in a negative way. Even Morgan, who I have the least connection with, bothers me not. And this is for me, truly. Our place, our state. Comparing it with others does no good. But we come to ask ourself where we are, what were doing, why? And maybe lacking this, has others connecting weighing on us, for they seem to agree, or relate. We embrace noe the superficial level. But even then, time brings all together, and these deeper things, which in a times past we'd be confident about and share, hold not but deep grooves. We are sharing on that level now. We are simply able, so trust yourself. Things are well. Ideas were present before, including Bella and Amon. Her ambiguity helped me much. We were letting things go by, unfolding as they were. Naturally I was sparked by our connection, and thought it meant something; sat with it no less. But I don't feel we were that true of friends. She seemed not to me. Were just more familiar. And I warped this into attachment. She is like me in a way, chatty, more or less confident, a little despondent over work, but gets it done. I feel distant from her though, as though she doesn't see me. The way we are does not compell her. Perhaps our prescence is not one of ease, but confidence, for she is in a way so. I feel our confidence doesn't work on her, which has me unsure. Those who draw our desire, require sincerity, yet we feel like there's nothing for us to do in that. We don't really wish to say anything, at least we don't desire. Yet, there is part of me that just always wanted to mention baseball; and it drove me crazy when I heard about her school: like, oh my, we know nothing, were so apart. Talking about that earlier in the year gave me so much breathe, as though we had caught up on our trepidations prior. I just find it hard to mind myself. Other people are easier to talk with for they don't evoke very much, draw little stake, throw me off in how I am. My dreams are holding me up. But you'll soon see, and breathe, the place for duty, our calm and serenity in reaching it, the cosmos of joy that surrounds. There will be imperfection, you'll find novel want, your feelings may even return. But we'll better, honest, open and true. Life has never pained me in what I lack, but from how I am, and how such being removes me from such. The effort in reconciling this with the burden of things was always hardest to do; and for an era we've accomodated that. Such is over, we're truly a man. But lets be on then, and merely be, rather than heed what at one point carried us along. Its similar to our regards for money, in that we lack it not, but feel immoderatley comfortable with the possibility. So it is with friendship and woman.
It is hard for me, in all our efforts, to look at things right now, see that there well, but still feel as though something is missing. One may point to the fact, that in having won more or less, that you feel there's something important: that of friendship. But I would respond with something I've experienced, and is worthy of sense, that time goes on, and your feeling now, will in fact change, and what felt so easy or triumphant, will come against some comnig morning or day, some setback or struggle with things we take for granted now: our nature is never so easy. And, further, what we feel is missing right now may just be in fact the way things are, and it's not easy; and that perhaps we had more expecation than a plan to reach these, when we were preoccupied. But, as those days come along, and our excitement settles into norms, and be it good or bad, effort becomes a noteworthy attention, that so will new excitment come, more plans and ideas, interests at that.
 As children it seems friends are the best. Only sugar makes our time tolerable without them. But as adults, we have priorities; and be they of ambition or common deed, we must do something: less it be given, which is a temporary, or else futile state. And so we are limited, by what we agree with, can allocate, and general exposure to people. In school you sit in a class, or many in highschool with people, who you can generally talk to all the time. And there's not much after school; and the idea of just sittnig at home, watching movies, staying up late and eating food is accessible. But as adults, we have less time to talk, less people to talk to, more expecattions upon us, more pecuniary need to go out, and in a way, more consequence for the quality of such things. Our metabolism lessens, our work wares on us. And indeed, someone with purpose, who retains passion and excitement, likely does so by some prescence of rules and sense. They may still go out, but its not so enviable, but a pass time. The peak of youth, or adolescence, is that where you do things of such sort for themselves, and as such in an extended way. When we got older I saw that people I knew were doing coke at clubs and what not. Like thats pushing it too far. And my sister for instance, like do you ever get a good sleep. Maybe your job affords that. And such is well. But I see someone who is cramping all the responsibility in life in order to prop up what is deisrable as no responsibility were present. And indeed, broader duties get fit to this, whereby you care for a mortage. Like why? Does this reflect the nature of your efforts being mroe a burden, and taking control of this feels relieving? I do not know.
 I think of the news and how unbecoming it is. And how a fatal flaw of people is to think that what is perhaps said or presented is the measure, and by that mark of reality, when in fact it is just publicity. In a similar way, I feel that we are hard done to admitt the heterogenity of community and people, and how all are really at liberty to do as they please, and move as such. Little groups of friends and family around. You must simply find your own. This is hard indeed, for I care little for the activity, less it excites me enough like those which I do already. Or the people draw me. But where to find them?
I see other people, sometimes for better, sometimes for worse. I perhaps take it for granted how well were able to see people. That when were down, like early Feb, we took comfort that I was not the onnly one and that others were not so special. A welcomed perspective. Yet, when were well, were happy to see everyone as so. Or even just feel like, as though the belief that they are is fine.
 I find myself though sulking, or at least sinking beneath our general view. Dreams pull me up. But were not in a true state of despondance.
 Indeed, I perhaps wrestle, as though well fed yet thinking of food, with the notion of free happiness, rather than liberal kinds. For I think of peopel around, who seem happy, talking with friends, going out after work, with school and better empployment strengthening all of this. And I see ourselves, somewhat wanting this, to be a part at least, yet, unconvincned of the freedom we really have, for all things ease; but also, for the road to liberty, those near and dear goods. I don't beleive we couldn't grab drinks, but that there are either none to be had, so simply and casually with people we know, or I just don't want to. But we could, and of all things, at least on offer and potential, are not exlusive for one like me. But comparing this, or considering at least the commission towards the sun and reading, my value compares: in both commission, 'where I'd do all things else, but prioritize such goods: they are done first'. Or, we just don't have an interest, out of fervour or sight.
 This is a positive stance, as were not saying, 'those things are stupid and wrong, and whoever does them is vain, and must be truly unhappy'. Were not. We prefer something else, or just don't care. And life ought merely be admitted, for the time which things were reared in us, to what is normally available, and by others had.
I'll end things here, but hearing some sad song, makes me feel like were on the outskirts of happiness, and thus comparability with those who are. And those who are unhappy, go their own way.
 Yet, in benig so happy, I see that we are not so easily entwined with others. One blatant fact as that things being fine is not an enditement of how you are, nor others. And days will go on, you'll carry the past, the present, and the future will bloom with respect to that. Work will stay as it is, we'll require maintence, Lord of Hatred and Crimson desert will come out, we'll see Withcer, make music, enjoy the lushness of spring. Perhaps freedom is a far memory, from Vancouver. Yet, as that moment was, we resorted, or at least took refuge in liberty: the goods from peace, rather than freedom. And I feel without; though warranting in our skepticism of inviting begruding and or laborours feelings, that their normal at least, to live frivlolously, or at least without liberty in mnid. That is the hardest part you see. Not that all from frienship, romance and kingdhood cannot be achieved amidst reason and delight: but that these latter hold no small bounds for their own affair.
So we are fine when things are well, but through circumstance we get attached. That feeling we get from someone, to say this or move that, has us retreat, as though not to get to compramised. For upon our seperation, we feel ourselves removed, wanting, but as such alone, for we have no real control or place in life. That was our situation in youth, that we felt on the edge of an ideal, but no where else. We said no to Pam, for I felt we had to go down below. I compare this to our current day, where I'd just remain, not needing to dip. Perhaps we'd need to acquaint though; and as we are now, and in our post-school life, such want from another is hard.
 The matter being said is one of asbcence of life, or at least position, yet the hardiness to this, or cowering, as to submitt to the request, but if only to avoid punishment, rather than excell. This has left me somewhat out of place, for time never felt wrong this way, through grade school. Funnily, in grade 4 for instance, the matter of girls and friends was absent, and we more or less excelled. Not by ardently trying, but we just had focus; our natural ability sufficed, and overdid itself sometime. But in grade 5, we had friends, and our focus slackened; I can't recall any meaningfull detail about our actual schooling. It was as though we were put away from this; having moved, the remaining element was that matter of school and living. Indeed, little was asked of me on that coming year, and our class was right. We did alright, but not overly well; but fit in none the less. Grade 7 though, I knew no one, nor really liked anyone. Oddly enough, this left me by this way or that on the out's of the general group of people, and i did not want to peer or work my way in. I found Eric competant and nice, but Alex in particular, was just rather unkind, and Eric seem to take from that. I just found that our confidence did not have a natural place amidst people, for we weren't already friends. But being unconfident, friendly as it were, going along, was of no interest to me. The feeling was flat, like I was lesser. So I became friends with Austin and Kaelen.
Maybe the most important talk of our lives, right here.
 Stating what the world is, who needs to.
 Are we not free as we please? Most mentions of said world only serve to remind us of this, and remove any condensed sense.
 Our experience tells all, and indeed, much of it is guided by neccessary things, such as going to work, eating well, sleeping properly, even our particular choice to be on the floor. But it is how we respond to these things and whatever else, that fashion our views and feelings of aversion and desire.
 One word that has come to mind is that of commission, in that, yes, I would like to date, casually even; but then I think of how this fits with other delights, be it in the mere harmony of blends, 'as in two flavors good on their own, but taste off when mixed'. There's that, or the more common notion of allocation, in that we only have so much time and effort to give. And indeed, one element is that of liberty, or that kind of care and want for things that run tangently with your duties; for such things never end, tend to raise discomfort and stress, and thus goods may be seen as those which run in harmony with this. A qualifier if you will.
 Another element is that of skill. As we are always aging, making concessions, or comprasmisess: growing up as you will. And indeed, this is not always reasonable, but in the service of what you feel just, so much as your capacity endows you with proper action. If exercise were not hard then we'd not go on diets, nor embolden ourselves to adhere to it and avoid poor things; we'd need no disclipine: it would merely be our nature. But inexperience and trying qualities prod us to find easier avenues, or aids at least. And indeed, for just ends; but via means that reflect your aptitude. Which itself changes. For instance, our ability to communicate with people was at one point mute, and we spoke to adults squintingly, or other lasses and lads with dispersion, or nerves. "A tight chest as it were, glancing eyes." We became sure of ourself indeed, but life brought with us a certain pain, in which this very inquiry which were talking off held tense views and activity; which in our relation with people, had us in some ways divided, or overly confident. When we worked at Superstore I recall being overly enthused and funny. Making jokes as it were. And indeed, by the time we hit Mariner we held more compitence and grace, yet still found it hard to approach things; entering buildings for one, showing up on the first day, making important phone calls. I was able, but subject to the pressure: unsure and wanting for the preferred thing to happen. But I rememeber specifically, in remembering our later time in Superstore, that we made a deliberate effort to learn people's name. It allowed you to talk to them, pass them by, be friendly and communal. In a word, we could be present. And now, having returned to Superstore, I've learned, or am becoming aware, of this almighty principle and practice, of being not merely open, nor simply doing what allows you to be there, but actually getting close to people. Learning what they like, don't like, hobbies, interests, etc. And more formal and personal things build from there. For in a way, happiness and ease float along, bearing pleasure at the lightness of work, but in that, needing some means, or at least fitting, to be so calm and merry. Ignoring people feels poor; but we sometimes feel upright, wanting, but also astute and what not, that forgoing people makes us feel less able to be as we are. In this current period of work, it is not so much me being merry, but finding pleasure in being with people, around them as it were. Indeed, confidence betrays me when I see someone who I'd like to talk to, and in one age we use this come forth and bear ourself upon them; realizing not that were serving our interest, not theirs. But, in not being as so, for in some sense we are only bringing ourselves closer, but in order to make themselves feel open, and more or less close to me, 'there with me, if you will', then I sit often with discomfort in not knowing how to do this, and I either tend to avoid them, or be so confident and believe there close to me --when in fact it is we who are there. And the response that has come to light, or communcation, is that of inquiry, sureness in ourself to reply, and really not much more. This comes in a passive everyday form, when you ask someone about their week, or how they feel about something in the department, or how their day is merely; and then there's personal inquiries, of what they do outside of work, whether their in school, their work-history, and for some, where their from. This is a habit and skill, employed no differently than any other. It takes time, shows your scarrs, areas your hiding. I would say though, that just as you may gain a firm and reticent view of the world, 'and not be in a affirming or suggestive view of it,' that so in regards to people may you truly be open, and not, as it's been, your soul self. For my fairest insight of Bella is that this wish for inquiry could not be made, and thus this feeling I had was one of insatiability; which i for a time avoided, but then, upon making said inquiries, I felt the past avoidance bubbling up. And the point, is that I felt not my self with her, like I was holding something back. And that if I had just been so, we'd have closure, fear not, and let things naturally be. For only then can real interest and comparibility bind someone. We are merely learning how to behave in such way, and in some sense, acquire this ultimate posture. For people are ulatimately the greatest yet trickiest things in the world. No one cares for us, warms us, pleases us and excites us more; but nothing hurts us more, worries us, defeats us, and causes, for me at least, so much melancholy and rancour. Indeed the bounds of the world come to pass, and truth may just not have its place to shine. For whatever reason, we at different places recognize this, and respond. Growing is often the most satsifying thing to do, but what inspires you, and the shell which you break out of, may not be so comforting. And to have grown so much, and feel there is more, or that, given this or that, we are still learning this fundmental thing. Again, for some, this is what they know, and partake in it best. Yet who are they, in in what capacity, do they behave as such. I feel personally that we are on route to being completely yet viruelenty strong. A full and true self, unhidden, bold and a deep and tender way.
So were moving in on tuesday. We work till 11:30, then were off till saturday. I'll consider finances at a later time.
 Everything is settled. Maninder, who's a bit of a cuty, is really nice, easy to communicate with. No fuss nor grough. Straight forward. I met Amon today, who said she lives with her husband in the second bedroom, then Nev and her son Aowyn, who live in a big room on the far conrer. The house has this grime to it, like its been lived in for a long time, but the actual pieces are great. The bathroom has a really nice shower, lots of light, very big. Were going to have so much fun jerking off in there. We'll have to figure out how to store our socks. The closet is crazy. There's two seperate main shelves, each with several, then a central one with minis. We'll put dirty clothes in there, maybe wrapping it all in less smelly shirts/sweaters. We'll see. The room itself is not so large, but I think its fair enough. Not noticably small. The window is so nice, adds so much great light. Its maybe a bit to high and short, but its the perfect direction. No screen though. There's plugs on each wall. We'll see about orientattion. Our scooter can go right in the hallway, which is great. Right in and out of the door. Hammond is literally a block away. Very short. 117th is a great stret, very open to the east, and a big wide road. Thorn is also nice. It sees over the dip further down, and will be nice to ride down. There's just a great feel. Busy, but not intrusive. There's a bike lane, and were right at the cross walk. Were literally at the mecca of points. The kitchen had me most concerned. Nearly all availed. The cupboard is massive. Too much space. And the fridge, which I expected to be poor, has a shelf, a cupboard, and two door slots, which all in all is very nice. Produce can go in the cupbaord, milk and what not in the door, and the shelf can likely fit several things of grain, which is all I need. There is plenty of room for air fryer --I don't rememebr a toaster. They've also got the world's largest microwave. Plus, the backdeck is really nice. Not private, but very open sky. Beautfiul to look at in the evening. Airport way is connected by 113, while maple crescent connects to the path on thorn, which is a really nice thing.
 One thing that's come up is the change in clocks, and the permanent nature of this. Since things are consistent, you can see how their meant to be. Now, what november through february would be, has changed. In effect, those months will have less early sunsets, but be very dark in the morning. I imagine this being somewhat worse, as it means it will be colder. This current daylight change is the new norm, and what wont be reversed is making the morning start later, or sun come out later, but also have it set later. This is not my preference at all, as we typcially go to bed around 9. On 5 shifts we are done everything and in bed by 9, while 6-630 is more like 930. Off nights we eat around 9, go to bed past 10. So this is fine. Indeed, right now the sun sets closer to 7, which is nuts, given the seemingly recent set aorund 5, some month ago. The issue is that we've less time, or reason for walking, and may lean towards early sunset, rather than dusk. For we generally want to have our potatoes and grain, but we need time. In the case of tonight, we ate at 8, and are going to bed 930. This is fine, though we are starting at 630. Were up nearly at 6. But for 5, such as this saturday, were turning everything off at 830. Which makes a 7-730 meal fine, but this means were out for sunset, not dusk. Which is nice, and novel, as this leans our off days to vie for the blue. The sun is going to set later though. At 8, 9? The peak of summer we'll be great for off days, but irreverent for non, though our last walk will be nice. Its really just about, when are we going on our setting walk, final ride, or dinnerish walk prior to a final ride.
So I wanted take this information home, refelct on it, and noruish our persepctive. For it is easy for something to signify a prospect; and indeed, telling other people cements this. But I'd rather do what is more sensible, and to our benefit, 'for nothing beats freedom and peace'.
 That is so, that Carry came up to me, asked me how old I was, to which I said 30, and when I asked why, she said that Bella had said something about me being so, and that me asking her out was almost inappropriate. Apparently Carry and Tara had said it doesn't matter. Carry even made this joke, 'your a big girl now'. I did not know what to say about this. One weird facet, is she said that Bella said this close to when I asked her out; which makes sense. Yet why she brought it up now, beats me.
 What I want to take away from this, is a very obvious and accepting sentiment, whereby we were not wrong to do as we did, nor were we that inflated in our ego our expectation. We perhaps could have listened to reason, but alas. It just made it clearer, and something I could sit with, that people are not this blank canvases that by some tactic or approach become indundated; and if not with you, then someone else. They have feelings, natural desire or lack there of. They're pretty regular, and something like asking someone out, that you work with, who you see as older, earns you an expecting no. I am reflecting on all of this, taking it all in, and seeing who we really are as people, where I stand, but also what I seek, where our view is off. We ought remove this feeling of loss, but thereby stand by a reasonable placement, where expectation and self-awareness, and form, is present. Bella simply did not like me. That's why she said no. This is pleasing to me. And indeed, I feel there's room to be a fool, for perhaps our approach would wokr elsewhere. We may just be naturally though, for instance; as asking someone how their week was or what not, or asking personal qeustions that bring you to such ease and familiarity; so is this with me, and thus whatever approach we'd take, the potential for so forward a move would be less needed, as we in our right mind would be closer as is. And moving from there is not so reserved. Perhaps you can tell, and reason may tell you what is likely. But at any rate, I'm pleased to be this way, and let our hopes and dreams be more obscure, if not defined yet of worth. We are and loose not.
So we are here, all moved in. A little adjusting, of the people mainly. I've met Amon, and she's nice, quiet. Pretty busy though. I hope to talk to her more; perhaps when I feel more up to it, and at a less busy time --she was making dinner, and I'm figuring everything out. I've not met her husband either. The other lady is named Nev.
 Right nwo the scooter charging is strange. The port may work, it may not. We might just bring it upstairs till they fix it; which I reckon they will. Apparently an electrician was meant to come to change the alarms, so hopefully that will come to pass in a week or two.
 Now this kid is crying, and holy crap. No fuss about it. It's just funny. Its like it draws my notice alot, yet it doesn't bother me. It's not anything unsoothing.
 I just want to go into the kitchen and eat. I've no idea if there's a toaster.
 Tomorrow will be better though. Its nearly 7. I wonder if this will be the norm. The husband aint home either. We will likely have the whole day to cook and what not. Through familiarity we can hopefully lose this sense of introduction, as we felt with Aaron. I just need to see them more. And indeed, we can ask, how their week is, their day, what they like if you surpass formality. But tonight we'll just have to live. I don't even know what we have. Indeed, we'll have to consider our timing, of when other people are cooking. I reckon our situation will make for much room and ease in doing everything short of potstickers or potatoes early in the day.
 This is just one of those things, where we've only just been here, an hour almost, and of course everyone is getting home. I don't know what I have either. It will become immediately better. And truly, I'm not bothered. You tend to knwo these things, like some odd sound, or when [whats her face] did that thing with the tap. It was so annoying. The place will be mine, and we can sleep.
 We've given 2700, which is literally half, following the 500. We'll do some 3 days or 4 days per week. Little of that matters.
 I'm really not in the mood for this. I don't have any sight on eating out though, despite tbe indian place being there. We could get fries or something. Langley Market is also there. Not sure though what we'd get.
 I feel this tremendous difference being here. The pitch of the world is so different, and that removes nearly all worry. When we got here though, I felt hot, pumped and confident; as though my freedom was for some treat. But there was nothing there. Strange it seems. One thought was that even though things are better and you feel free, doesn't mean your life goes away, or you have to get caught up by this free sense, 'where you hot and confident aspirations take float'. Words here are not entirely placed, btu friendship with Bella is what I seek, but there's no room for pithyness from lacking that. And if she were down to fuck, why would she be. And I don't think the broader world, where people matter, work is relevant, if not respected, 'like Joey does', and if your an adult, that so any sense of 'where missing sex, she's getting it, were lame, worse off, everyone high fiving her', so this doesn't exist in this more material and grounded world. And if she doesn't see it beyond that, then she is not taken by the common view and deed, 'and flitters and sprouts about, like a child'; or if she does, and she merely has pleasure and love as part of her life, than thats fine, because were on the same playing field. I don't wish to enter this contrived view, as though the world were different, oppertune, away from work and liberty. And why even note this. It just makes my freedom feel a bit slow, as though things remain normal, but have motion through this more open place.
Nothing has impacted my life more than the choice to recede and cultivate. For ends pure, by methods sound, but in a manner that is akin to prep, rather than being. And we indeed always felt as though we'd continue to be.
 Truly, this has never ceased being so. But, we do feel pains in our heart for lost time, seperation from people, a sense that were not with anything otherwise. Moreover, I feel there are fears and doubts, aspirations but also indolence as regards our aims and views, desires and cares. We stand little but what is pleasing now; even if it has been of a good kind, the fuse always goes out. Perhaps it is privalege and fortune that make it easy to see now, but indeed, it is of the right sort. For it is not so that it could remain this way, but that it may continue, just as we go.
 While my mind is ripe, I'll speak to the good I see. For one, the street outisde has this nice sharpness, as though the blend of traffic, sidewalks, high prescence yet not overly dense prescence of trees, the open road in front of us, and the overall quality of the street, makes for something akin to a beach, in that its busy for sure, yet somehow pristince. Looking down it acts like a monorail, accelerating your view. Bringing our scooter upstairs is hardly ideal, but it is not too hard and there's room for it. That reminds me, we need to buy some things on amazon. Truly, a small fan would block any semblence of noise. I heard a little tv having my ear on the ground. The night was otherwise silent. But the light outside is not so nice. Not desparaging, but I think we could just get a clip on and put a sheet. Anyway, I've gotten to know Nev and Amon, and their kid. I would like to meet the husband; for one thing that limits a shared living is the sensitivity, or reserve, in going to the kitchen when others are there. I need to be able to eat as I like. Truly, and our backgrounds further this, but I feel little expecattion from me. Sometimes getting acquinted allows for pleasantry to do; and if there's more, than the experience is a positive one, and welcomed. At any rate, I don't feel sure about the bathroom light; though our mind being here is one that in a way seeps all the activity in, and so this little bit does not matter. Living at home felt fragile and trepidatious, and so every small bit count. In this case, I feel there's so much room to do big and hefty things, that small things aren't disagreeable. Having to lock the door for instance feels not. I'd note the draw of vainess and vice, whereby we see that as such room as we have, that we should pursue things, and we feel bad if not.
 The room is very nice. The mat fits right in, our yoga matt has plenty of room, the storage is hidden yet excessive. The stairs are no issue. Its really nice to be able to jerk off, wake up early, go for walks, stay up late, read, write, game, watch tv, or discomforting movies, and look ahead, to both work and wonder to come. The word that comes to mnid when I think of the reason for this, or seed, is just.
Do not let this feeling erode you. You simply don't trust her, wish to see her, want to apporach her as a friend. We avoided for long, but given that we said we like her, or rather, asked if she liked me, 'so naieve', it feels strange to consider avoiding her. Yet, we were friends, but such currents swelled below; and our tripping let them rush up, or feel good at least at the thought of doing so. No matter, we were friends, and just like going into work, those who you see and who you feel see you are easy to come up to, no problem. I'm kind of facing that with Angel now, where were not really friends, but can still talk. A smile is good here. I reckon this is so with me and Bella. But I do not know how I'd deal with seeing her outside. This never happens, ever. But I imagine where she lives, as though were hoping she doesn't come on by; she leaves us then, which makes me feel worse. The idea is that we'd both say hi, yet want to go, for there is awkward thing that happened. I feel fine at work. But again, if the moment invites it we talk, or say hi, but I tend not to go up to her. I am not her friend. I don't feel I'm allowed to be. Which is odd. For that is all I truly wanted, to talk with her. And indeed, there may be overeactions here, and old currents brewing, but that part of me that drew to her, saw something beautiful, or of worth at least, 'near opposite of nargus for instance', I could feel all the hooks and worry that brought me away, or held me back. Which bothered me, and had me somewhat concerend.
In any case, I was thinking of our book, and how I want to make 2024 and last year readable. We went through Nearly Modern, am pretty familiar with Moral, and we've named up to the spring of 2025. I was compamring this to Rounding Out, or the time near it, and how we were trying to make somehting to do. While the point of liberty is that you have trust in yourself and work, life and reason, peace as it were, to do and see as you please, approach, or at least direct yourself and bear intent, unperturbed, without fret or cause. I need say no more.
 One part is of the lenght of work. I look at the Mason and how much it is solid. It runs many periods though, and indeed, our intent is for both these past years. I reckon we've not the effort or care to go through all periods. It is also hard to know what things are. Everything is so well, yet un-triumphant, like red and blue or marks. But you learn. I rememebr the PLutarch piece in Moral, though nothing else comes to mind .There's just so much. There is something to be said about making each period into a book. Mabye 300 pages long, slightly larger font. I think 2025 is a bit less dense, and so you could do the first part, and this second part. One being for Peace, the other being Won or something. Which indeed is how I feel, that I need not make concessions; all resting on the sligthest ray of reason and kind. All feels well, the whole world there, brought together by and drive forward through time. "The mark of liberal joy and just freedom." Color of Ends seems not too long, yet, I consider it formative, as do I Nearly Modern, and Moral. I am reading Warm Winters now, and it has served me well, and truly, different moments call for different books. Sometimes you wish for those original and or sepculative thinking, while other times you want something more reflective and certain. "It is perhaps a mark of wisdom sinking in, for continuity sake, and our candor and must bringing good to fruitiion, for I have less things to say."
 I figure that certain sections be permitted, and used to fashion the portions of eace piece. Moral begins with the collective, has the part around pitt meadows, then those mentions of principle and quality. We'll see whether we add near. Psylist ought be added to Nearly Modern. For Peace can likely end near the fall, when things began to tip over. Much has been said in the mean time. And indeed, each book is 9$, maybe less given the shorter lenght. As proofs, they are literally so, and serve as directives, insights and drafts, for something important and useful. Indeed, I am familiar with Nearly Modern, and apt to organize it the most, and then add the Psylist --needs a name.
 One note, is that the Mason works in a period like way, but with sections within each. Near light for instance has it's first part, but then includes summer as its second. While Warm Winters has the Mark through Red and Blue, then Fruits of Freedom through Aging Past as the second. I would like to experiment with adding such sections into the page headers, for reference and targeting through page-turning. Having children, past, philo, joy, or the collective for insatnce, fits in that way. It merely begins, with say the collective, and a list of the entries, then 'the collective' atop each of those pages, as if it were a chapter.
 I feel like I could describe the story of sums, if it were being told to someone. One note, is that I mean to show the starting set, or idea rather, using the notion of a clock, and the fibinocci sequence to relate the run. Clocks are like ranges or degree. At any rate, I figured I would say that this intial part is all I want to tell, and that a full view sits atop of it, where we have different clocks, full sets within each, more complex runs. And my point is that if these things are known, then I would like to learn more; and if it is not, and this is something I've discovered, then I reckon credit is derserved, and I have not neccessarily a right, but a privalege to try to propose the reason for sums happening. "To explain what I've discovered. If it already has been, then I'd like to know."
One way to look at life, in simplicity, is that being yourself is paramount, and remarks a sort of integrity, not to hunger, want or expect. Even if you have merrit, and sense repor and chemistry; to have forgone, and nourished a sort of mind and soul that has little ego, as might overinfatuate onself by such attachment, or else, onver inflate the anticipation, as though you were bound to earn it. Such has been part of my travels.
 But another element is that of work, or at least some place in life in which you are more or less in control, dependant on your views and will; and thereby subject to the fruits of this continuity; the motion of which, which is to say, when in motion, 'and not so begruding', so is liberty reached.
 Nothing about this excites me to share with anyone, those far off views, or even things that are with me when in full liberty. Sometimes at work, or home, or in my calmer times, we have but common cares and agendas. Yet, were driven by what we know, those moments that experienced. And indeed, we could refelct on our whole adult life, looking at our attitudes, chcoies, misgivings and or desires, and balance these aginst the weight of our liberty, and whether it was merely a shining memory, yet short lived, 'and carrying us like some gem at the end of stick', or if it was something often expeirenced, in both full strides but also in general, 'as if icing dripping down the side of the cake, or sap on tree bark'. Indeed, as a star is destined to blow upon that iron range, that so when a man experiences liberty, or an undisturbed sight during work, so is he made. For we all change our candour and hue when under stress, and even if it is light; for labor is perhaps, by defintiion, a remark of motion rather than quality. But, in how we take in such effort, if it stears us towards larseny and or lavishness, so is our memory of liberty faint. Whereas a frequent experience drips into those hefty times, permitting none of the contrary rubish; and indeed, offers a rather pleasing and rejuvinating calm, as though your work and effort were truly worthwhile. "Giving root and ground for such treats."
I suspect that the motion of love is one that does not really justify itself, on it's own at least. It seems to be a motion that reflects some overly attuned part of us, but is a motion no less.
 And I'd state that life is full of various motions, as reflects its varied candor. And as such, the motion of love is merely one to fit into the medley.
 As someone may need a fortifying motion, or enduring one, and that upon failure, or ill-fit, that so is the entire medley dragged. And indeed, love can make the whole medley feel like its lifted off the sky, 'that one mighty glowing strand'. But so may it make the whole fall. And in most inquiries and suggestion, it is stated that such elation is no virtue, nor something which bears benefit. Indeed, the approach is what is so exciting. But indeed, there is reason to believe that part of this excitement is built on the sense of relief, as perhaps reflects other parts of you less privy to love, or that such matter of love is too springy and spry, and thus is not so much in love, but releasing impinged motion. The experience of elation may seem great, as in ectasy. But philosophy will tell us, as an example, that scratching an itch is not so mucn in itself a good, but rather not having an itch. And indeed, much draws us, and love is part of this. As the most precious of feelings, and elusive per the thing loved, that so must we learn, fall and grow. But our ability ought be balanced off with sense, as not to be so succumbed to the matter of love, in her awkward and or throbbing way. Nor should we feel as though, upon it finally happening, that we have nothing else in life. For indeed, it may just work then, and embrace is all of the delight. But life moves on, your enthusiasm goes, and your either missing things else, or unkept to be in love as you are, and in effect, furnish the relation with something more than yearning, want or relief. To bring life requires form, and this pairs well with the steadier version, or manner of love, whereby it happens in a more warm and tender form, rather than overly hot and exasterbated. In such a place, the feeling of love is not overhwhelming, nor so enticing that it draws us away from life. Nor do we feel as though some great feet is upon us, but rather we may confide and or sit with the whole of our medley, and merely communicate.
Memory is a fine thing, serving as a measure for how things are and likely to proceed. At the very least it acts like a compass, telling us what is desirable or not.
 And I think of those days with Ashely, the one night in particular, where she invited me over, and we sat and watched movies, then fooled around upstiars. Funnily enough, I never saw her after that. She jerked me off, wonderfully, but I did not want to touch her after that. Normally this is so when you cum, but indeed, there was no real want, like I was repulsed by it. We just weren't there enough. This is something I want though, for we feel like we have free time. Its the best kind of indulgence, or free use of your time. Yet we can't fnid that, or know where to at least. I think of those on Survivor, who may cuddle and be with one another, and indeed, sometimes feelings arise. But it all comes from being friends, or having that actual fun and playfullness together. They don't just have feelings.
 But were stuck then in the coarse of inconstance, of a bold yet merry way, a way which is beckoned to the whole, yet certain of not. A bound that is either in, or returns to a prominent state. Where the vector is one of motion, rather than intent. Direction does fashion us, but only in the route of our current step, rather than vying for some end.
 Sometimes I just think of the perfect moment. But it is always from a slumpped state, one in which we are not really ourselves, bright, full, true. And reconciling the nature of this is the hardest thing to do. Indeed, we have fair experience from 2020, where we saw the fairness of work and how it provided and harmonized with our care. But such a time was one of somehwhat burden, and what I really delighted in felt precious, as our work still wore on us. At least, our proficiency there really felt like so, as if we had gotten a handle on a large weight. This weight lessened in Vancouver, and indeed, much of this had to do with our place in work, as we were friendly and ourselves. I felt less need to inquire, as it either happened naturally, or we just felt clear and on route for our own care. I was able to just let Simron go, see how things'd be. I really felt this warm and earthy texture during the morn, as though we were on the pulse of life, in all its rough yet wholesome ways. For so long, reoccuringly at least, we've left such path, and reached peaks of a much fainter mount. A place that always saw us moving, feeling promise and verification from such reutrn, but through the subject matter of our view from such mount. This is off and remains so. The recent year has been an odd one, as it was never really ares, yet we were fine. Perhaps we just didn't ask the right questions, and had in part a proper form, but one with odd sides and propoertions, given the cirucmstance. And as such, I feel we could not really move in the truest of motion, as we were perhaps to harkoned to learning, or to ill-fit for health and the norm of regularity. we've only been in a different position for 3 days, and its hard to see how things will go. I know in my heart, feel it even thorugh much of these days, that being in motion will bring your real self out, and all things people will feel more present and nourishing, as will work feel more culpable, but thereby calming if were of liberty in respect to it. We'll admire that, appreciate it, and liekly bear promise and sharpness in our planning, leisure and views. We remain hopefuly, but at our root secure in our care for other people, in romance for instance or relationships. For these things are not really built on want but ability, for natural connection to ensure, and grow into something more solid. Were just being ourself, able to be as the moment calls, or what we seek. Bold enough to be forward, strong enough to be vulnerable, worry not. And indeed, notice little, less someone really strikes your mind.
Just wanted to make the little point, that in terms of this feeling, or aprehension, of Saturady, centering around Bella, that there isn't anything for you to do. There is no choice to be made. Let this remove your worry, as though you have to show up. You can worry about you, your want, your need, your life. This is how its suppose to be. I reckon everyone is like this, and that perhaps being in one place for a long period of time naturally creates inroads for people who fit your view to come in. Because I've never gotten the sense that anyone was living on the edge, ready to throw themselves into something, new, or emotional. We have our own lives. And friends who fit in that. My point being, that we kinda ignore everyone else, or consider them little. We go home from work to do our thing. Given though, that we think of our life, making it about me, that we are not so, in spirit I should say, distant from that genuine prescence and or vulnerability, which lets you open yourself to someone, be known, learn and share. Were just not waiting, living rather ambivolently, with the mind that this behavior will situate ourself with people, as though our goal was merely some form of communal peace. At least, in part, I see how we may have that, but as me. We are kind and charitable, but in a way your just happy to be, and fine to. I feel as though most people are like this, and that they don't expect much. Perhaps they see others who are not so keen or bold to give.
So I'm pretty good. Things are well, the room is fine. Amon and Nev are great. I have a pretty natural disinterest in going in there if they're there, but its no real big deal. They treat you like a roomate, and in some sense barely notice i'm there. Not awkward. The sheets worked fine last night; hopefully it doesnt ruin the paint. I took it on and off and it didn't. Its still rained, but everything is still really fine. 117th is its own direction, branching off towards camwood or river road, or thorn is really nice, or going down 207th. The trees are very tall but only bushy at the top. There's a lot of character but no real density, like 193. It was quite cold last night; just wore cargo pants, and long socks were important. I mean to return our scale, cancel copilot, and return one of the sheets. Masturbating has been great, from the privacy and use of our light. I am aware of this feeling of love, as though your whole life bears balance and so you wish to throw yourself in. Then there's want, which many things satisfy. Trying out soccer could be fun, though its suppose to rain. Its 19+, and we'll just have a really good time.
